title: From Sparse X-rays to 3D CT: Training-Free Reconstruction with Diffusion Priors
summary: Solving 3D medical inverse problems typically requires training dedicated supervised models for each specific task and measurement setting. To break this dependency, we present TF-PRDiT: a training-free conditional sampling framework that converts a frozen voxel-level 3D Diffusion Transformer prior into a versatile inverse medical problem solver. Building on the posterior-sampling view of diffusion inverse solvers, TF-PRDiT enforces measurement consistency during sampling via a task-specific forward operator rather than updating model weights, enabling a single pretrained prior to be reused across diverse conditional settings. Our method combines a predictor-corrector sampler with likelihood-based guidance on the denoised prediction, providing stable data-fidelity correction while preserving the underlying 3D anatomical prior. We highlight our framework's capability on the challenging task of X-ray-to-CT reconstruction by integrating a differentiable DRR projector to allow gradients to propagate directly from projection space back to voxels without any retraining. Experiments on LIDC-IDRI demonstrate that TF-PRDiT achieves strong reconstruction quality and uniquely scales to an arbitrary number of input X-rays (1-12) under a unified model, with performance improving consistently as additional views are provided. Beyond X-ray-to-CT, we show that simply swapping the forward operator extends the same frozen model to 3D super-resolution, volumetric infilling, and deblurring without any task-specific retraining, demonstrating that a single 3D diffusion prior can serve as a universal solver for volumetric medical inverse problems.

AI.tldr: TF-PRDiT是一个无需训练的3D条件采样框架，利用冻结的扩散Transformer先验，通过任务特定的前向算子实现测量一致性，可统一解决多种3D医学逆问题（如X光到CT重建、超分辨率、体积填充和去模糊），无需为每个任务重新训练模型。
AI.motivation: 传统3D医学逆问题求解需要为每个特定任务和测量设置训练专用的监督模型，缺乏通用性和灵活性。本文旨在打破这种依赖关系，使单个预训练先验模型能够复用多种条件设置。
AI.method: 提出TF-PRDiT框架，基于后验采样的扩散逆求解器视角，通过任务特定的前向算子在采样过程中强制执行测量一致性（而非更新模型权重），结合预测器-校正器采样器和基于似然性的去噪预测指导，实现稳定的数据保真度校正。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集上，X光到CT重建任务中实现强重建质量，且单一模型可处理1-12个任意数量的输入X光，性能随视角增加而提升。此外，仅通过替换前向算子，同一冻结模型即可泛化到3D超分辨率、体积填充和去模糊任务。
AI.conclusion: 单个3D扩散先验可以作为通用求解器，统一解决多种体积医学逆问题，无需任何任务特定的重新训练，展示了训练框架在医学成像领域的巨大潜力。

title: Dataset-Aware Cold-Start Active Learning for Annotation-Efficient 3D Medical Image Segmentation
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Supplementary material available as ancillary file
summary: Deep learning for 3D medical image segmentation requires extensive manual annotations, a major bottleneck in volumetric medical imaging. Active learning aims to reduce this burden by selecting informative samples for annotation, but most methods assume that an initial labeled set is already available. This leaves the cold-start problem largely unresolved: how to select the first volumes from a fully unlabeled pool before any task-specific model is trained. We propose CSCS, a Curriculum-Stratified Cold-Start framework that adapts initial sample selection to the structure of the unlabeled dataset. CSCS combines two self-supervised, label-free signals: local typicality, measuring representativeness in the embedding space, and reconstruction-based uncertainty, used as a proxy for sample difficulty. These signals are combined through a weighted geometric score, where the weighting is determined by a closed-form pacing rule based on the effective annotation budget and the Difficulty-Coverage Ratio, a pool-level statistic measuring the alignment between difficulty and representativeness. We evaluate CSCS on four 3D medical image segmentation benchmarks: BraTS, FeTA, Spleen, and an in-house fetal MRI dataset. Using nnU-Net as downstream segmentation model, CSCS shows consistently competitive performance across datasets and annotation budgets, with the strongest gains in low-to-mid annotation regimes. These results suggest that dataset-aware cold-start initialization can improve the robustness of active learning for 3D medical image segmentation by adapting sample selection to the geometry of the unlabeled pool.

AI.tldr: CSCS是一种面向3D医学图像分割的冷启动主动学习框架，通过结合局部典型性和基于重建的不确定性两种无监督信号，在无任何标注数据的情况下智能选择初始标注样本，在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法假设已有初始标注集，无法解决冷启动问题（如何在无任何标注数据时选择首批样本），而手工标注大量3D医学图像成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出CSCS框架，结合两种无标签信号：局部典型性（衡量嵌入空间中的代表性）和基于重建的不确定性（衡量样本难度），通过加权几何分数融合，权重由有效标注预算和难度-覆盖比（DCR）决定。
AI.result: 在BraTS、FeTA、Spleen及内部胎儿MRI四个3D医学图像分割基准上，使用nnU-Net作为下游模型，CSCS在低到中等标注预算下表现最优，整体性能稳定领先。
AI.conclusion: 数据集感知的冷启动初始化能提升3D医学图像分割主动学习的鲁棒性，通过自适应地根据未标注池的数据结构选择样本。

title: LLM-Driven Heuristic Frame-Level Quantization Parameter Adaptation for VVenC
summary: Optimal frame-level quantization parameter (QP) allocation remains a persistent challenge in modern video encoders. The fixed-QP scheme widely adopted in practical systems is inherently content-agnostic, while classical Lagrangian rate-distortion optimization (RDO) methods often suffer from inaccurate multiplier settings. In this paper, we explore the use of large language models (LLMs) to automatically design RDO heuristics for frame-level QP adaptation. We construct a closed-loop evolutionary framework in which the LLM iteratively proposes RDO heuristics as algorithmic ideas with executable code, and these candidates are evaluated directly through encoding with the Fraunhofer Versatile Video Encoder (VVenC), where each heuristic acts as a scoring function that compares different QP choices based on the encoding statistics of past frames and current candidates. Experimental results across multiple test sets show that the evolved heuristic achieves promising rate-distortion improvements over both the fixed-QP scheme and the Lagrangian baseline. Further analysis reveals that the LLM can autonomously discover an adaptive heuristic that penalizes QP fluctuations via entropy-based terms, providing new insights into the design of RDO algorithms

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用大语言模型（LLM）通过闭环进化框架自动设计帧级QP分配的自适应RDO启发式策略，在VVenC编码器上验证了优于固定QP和经典拉格朗日方法的率失真性能。
AI.motivation: 固定QP方案内容无关，而经典拉格朗日RDO方法存在乘数设置不准确的问题，帧级QP优化分配仍是现代视频编码器的难题。
AI.method: 构建闭环进化框架，LLM迭代提出基于RDO的启发式策略（包含可执行代码），通过VVenC编码评估候选策略，每个启发式作为评分函数，基于历史帧和当前候选的编码统计来比较不同QP选择。
AI.result: 在多个测试集上，进化得到的启发式策略在率失真性能上优于固定QP方案和拉格朗日基线方法。
AI.conclusion: LLM能够自主发现通过熵项惩罚QP波动的自适应启发式策略，为RDO算法设计提供了新思路。

title: Transaction Costs and Speed in the Ethereum Ecosystem: Scalability of the Mainnet and Layer 2s
summary: We study the evolution of transaction speed and fees from January 2024 through March 2026, comparing Ethereum Mainnet and its Layer 2 (L2) networks, as well as Solana and Polygon. Ethereum has undergone upgrades that have increased block size and blob count. These upgrades have doubled transactions per second (TPS) on both the Mainnet and the L2 networks. Mainnet median fees have fallen from over \$2 to under \$0.02, and L2 median fees have fallen more than 95% from \$0.05 to \$0.0015. We forecast that Mainnet median fees will converge with Solana in August 2027, but TPS will remain below 100 until 2034. The L1 Strawmap, proposing EIP-7938, a potential exponential increase in the gas limit, brings the Mainnet to only 100 TPS in January 2028. With continued blob expansion, L2s will surpass Solana TPS in March 2029 and have lower median fees by October 2026.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了2024年1月至2026年3月以太坊主网、Layer 2、Solana和Polygon的交易速度和费用演变。以太坊升级使主网和L2的TPS翻倍，主网中位费用从2美元以上降至0.02美元以下，L2中位费用下降95%以上。预测主网中位费用将在2027年8月与Solana趋同，但TPS到2034年仍低于100。L1 Strawmap（EIP-7938）使主网在2028年1月仅达100 TPS。L2将在2029年3月超越Solana的TPS，并在2026年10月实现更低的中位费用。
AI.motivation: 比较以太坊主网、L2网络与Solana、Polygon在交易速度和费用方面的演变趋势，评估以太坊升级的效果，并预测未来的性能收敛时间点。
AI.method: 收集2024年1月至2026年3月的实际交易数据，对比不同区块链网络的TPS和交易费用，并基于当前趋势对未来的性能收敛进行预测分析。
AI.result: 以太坊升级使主网和L2的TPS翻倍；主网中位费用从>$2降至<$0.02，L2中位费用从$0.05降至$0.0015（降幅>95%）。预测主网中位费用将于2027年8月与Solana趋同，但TPS直到2034年仍低于100；L2将于2029年3月超越Solana的TPS，并在2026年10月实现更低中位费用。
AI.conclusion: 以太坊升级显著降低了交易费用并提升了TPS，但主网TPS增长有限；L2网络在可扩展性方面展现出更大潜力，有望在未来几年超越Solana的性能水平。

title: FlowCodec: One-Step Flow Prior for Generative Image Compression
summary: Diffusion-based image compression methods, leveraging powerful generative priors, have demonstrated remarkable perceptual quality at ultra-low bitrates. However, adapting modern generative models to image compression often relies on carefully engineered conditioning or auxiliary branches, together with substantial retraining, and these costs grow as the models scale. This motivates an open question: Can stronger generative priors be integrated into compression through a simpler, more extensible design? To answer this, we propose FlowCodec, a streamlined framework that plugs pretrained large-scale text-to-image priors (e.g., Qwen-image-2512 and FLUX.1-dev) into ultra-low-bitrate codecs. FlowCodec decomposes the pipeline into two decoupled stages: (1) Latent Compression, which maps clean latents to bitrate-constrained noisy latents; and (2) Latent Transport, which leverages the pretrained prior to refine the noisy latents toward the clean ones in a single step. Notably, FlowCodec requires neither additional conditioning signals nor auxiliary networks. Furthermore, with lightweight adaptation, it can flexibly support multiple bitrates while keeping the number of trainable parameters below 0.54% of the generative backbone. Experiments show that FlowCodec preserves high visual quality at bitrates below 0.05 bits per pixel. The Qwen-image variant significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of LPIPS and DISTS, while both variants deliver higher PSNR and clearly faster encoding than existing one-step diffusion-based methods, with the FLUX variant also maintaining competitive decoding speed.

AI.tldr: FlowCodec提出了一种将预训练大规模文本到图像先验（如Qwen-image和FLUX.1-dev）集成到超低码率图像编解码器的简化框架，通过解耦为潜在压缩和潜在传输两个阶段，无需额外条件信号或辅助网络，在低于0.05 bpp的码率下保持高视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像压缩方法通常需要精心设计的条件机制或辅助分支以及大量重新训练，且成本随模型规模增长。因此，作者探索能否通过更简单、可扩展的设计将更强的生成先验集成到压缩中。
AI.method: FlowCodec将流程解耦为两个阶段：(1) 潜在压缩——将干净潜在表示映射到码率受限的噪声潜在表示；(2) 潜在传输——利用预训练先验在单步中将噪声潜在表示精炼为干净潜在表示。无需额外条件信号或辅助网络，且通过轻量级适配可灵活支持多种码率。
AI.result: 在低于0.05 bpp的码率下保持高视觉质量；Qwen变体在LPIPS和DISTS指标上显著优于现有方法；两个变体在PSNR和编码速度上均优于现有单步扩散方法；FLUX变体保持有竞争力的解码速度。
AI.conclusion: FlowCodec通过解耦设计和利用预训练大模型先验，实现了更简单、可扩展的超低码率图像压缩框架，验证了将强生成先验通过简洁设计集成到压缩中的可行性。

title: Endogenous Randomness from Adversarial Market Learning
summary:
We propose a deterministic adversarial market model in which apparent randomness emerges endogenously from the interaction between a market mechanism and a population of predictive traders. Unlike a classical generative adversarial network, the model does not attempt to imitate an external empirical data distribution and does not inject random noise into a generator. The market is represented by a deterministic binary return path, while traders learn predictive strategies from observed in-sample history and trade on an out-of-sample continuation. The market then adapts against the traders by reducing their predictive and trading edge.
  The central experiment begins with a smooth, highly predictable market path. Traders with multiple lookback windows and multiple holding periods learn to predict future cumulative returns. Initially, these traders earn large out-of-sample profits. After adversarial market adaptation, their out-of-sample profitability collapses toward zero. Importantly, in the final clean specification, no explicit sign-balance, transition-rate, or autocorrelation penalties are imposed. Nevertheless, the out-of-sample return sequence becomes balanced, has transition rate close to one half, has low autocorrelation, and passes block-based distributional diagnostics. In a medium-size experiment with $T_{\mathrm{IS}}=2000$ and $T_{\mathrm{OOS}}=10000$, the out-of-sample positive-return fraction is $0.5010$, the transition rate is $0.4896$, and the maximum absolute autocorrelation is $0.0275$. Binary return blocks transformed into dyadic variables are close to uniform on $[0,1]$, and normalized block sums are broadly consistent with a standard normal law. These results support the hypothesis that market randomness can arise as the endogenous residue of arbitrage pressure rather than from exogenous stochastic shocks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个确定性对抗性市场模型，其中市场机制与预测性交易者的互动内生地产生了表面上的随机性。实验表明，经过对抗性市场适应后，交易者的样本外利润趋近于零，而市场回报序列变得平衡、低自相关，通过了多种分布诊断，支持市场随机性源自套利压力的内生残余而非外生随机冲击的假说。
AI.motivation: 传统金融模型通常将市场随机性归因于外生随机冲击，本文旨在探索市场随机性是否可能内生地产生于市场机制与交易者的对抗互动中，挑战经典的市场效率假说和生成对抗网络的范式。
AI.method: 构建确定性对抗性市场模型：市场由确定性二元收益路径表示，交易者从样本内历史学习预测策略并在样本外交易，市场通过减少交易者的预测和交易优势来对抗适应。采用多回看窗口和多持有期的交易者，初始使用平滑高可预测路径，观察市场适应后的样本外表现。
AI.result: 在中等规模实验（T_IS=2000, T_OOS=10000）中，样本外正回报比例为0.5010，转换率为0.4896，最大绝对自相关为0.0275。二元回报块经变换后接近[0,1]均匀分布，标准化块和广泛符合标准正态分布。
AI.conclusion: 市场随机性可以源自套利压力的内生残余，而非外生随机冲击，这为理解市场微观结构和价格行为提供了新视角。

title: Leakage-Aware Benchmarking of LLM Forecasting: Real-Time Nowcasts as the Decision-Time Input for Macro Factor Ranking
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on AI Forecasting (Forecasting as a New Frontier of Intelligence). Non-archival. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=mi8QiWomm3
summary: Forecasting benchmarks for retrieval-augmented LLMs routinely confound model capability with information leakage: features labeled with a target's timestamp are often not observable at the system's decision time. We study leakage-controlled equity factor ranking with a retrieval-augmented 7B open-source LLM forecaster. At each month-end from 2023-04 to 2026-03, the forecaster observes only decision-time information: lag-shifted FRED macro variables, recent macro-event summaries, and the Cleveland Fed's archived daily CPI nowcast for unreleased current-month inflation. A macro-analog retrieval module selects historical states, a critic LLM compresses them into one tactical rule, and an actor LLM maps the current state and recent rules into scores for seven U.S. equity style factors. The full pipeline obtains a median monthly Spearman rank IC of +0.154, with positive means across three non-overlapping contiguous 12-month subwindows; the mean IC remains statistically underpowered, with a bootstrap 95% confidence interval that includes zero. Non-LLM baselines under the same decision-time constraint demonstrate that a kNN macro-analog model recovers a comparable median IC, indicating that real-time inflation information and macro-similar retrieval explain much of the median signal. The LLM pipeline retains higher mean IC and a stronger long-short allocation sanity check, suggesting that any marginal benefit is concentrated in the extreme rankings that drive long-short portfolio formation. A descriptive audit of the 36 critic rules and per-month case studies appears in the appendix.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于检索增强的7B开源LLM预测系统，用于控制信息泄露的权益因子排名预测。系统在2023-04至2026-03期间每月使用决策时可观测的数据（滞后FRED宏观变量、宏观事件摘要、CPI即时预测），通过宏观模拟检索、评论家LLM压缩生成战术规则、行动者LLM打分，最终获得中位月度Spearman IC为+0.154，但统计显著性不足。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强LLM的预测基准常混淆模型能力与信息泄露问题——标注了目标时间戳的特征在系统决策时实际不可观测。作者希望通过严格控制信息泄露，评估LLM在真实决策时间约束下的预测能力。
AI.method: 使用7B开源LLM，每月末仅使用决策时可观测信息（滞后FRED宏观变量、宏观事件摘要、克利夫兰联储存档的CPI即时预测）。通过宏观模拟检索模块选择历史状态，评论家LLM将其压缩为一条战术规则，行动者LLM结合当前状态和近期规则对七个美国权益风格因子打分。
AI.result: 完整系统获得中位月度Spearman等级IC为+0.154，三个非重叠12个月子窗口均呈正均值，但均值IC统计上不显著（bootstrap 95%置信区间包含零）。kNN宏观模拟模型在相同约束下能达到可比的中位IC，LLM管道在均值IC和多空配置合理性检查上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 实时通胀信息和宏观相似性检索解释了大部分中位信号；LLM带来的边际收益主要集中在极端排名上，这些排名驱动多空投资组合构建。虽然LLM管道在极端排名上有额外优势，但总体预测能力在统计上并不显著。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Risk-Sensitive Investment Management: a Free Energy--Entropy Duality Approach
summary: This paper develops a reinforcement-learning approach to continuous-time risk-sensitive benchmarked asset allocation in a partly model-based setting. The benchmarked problem does not directly fit the standard Markovian stochastic-control template: the state is uncontrolled, whereas the terminal reward contains a controlled Itô integral. We use free energy-entropy duality to reformulate the problem as a linear-quadratic-Gaussian stochastic differential game under an equivalent probability measure, yielding explicit finite- and infinite-horizon saddle-point solutions. This structure guides a continuous-time $q$-learning actor-critic method: the quadratic value function motivates the critic, while the affine saddle-point controls motivate deterministic actors for the portfolio allocation and adversarial control. The learned allocation admits an economic interpretation through fractional Kelly decompositions. A proof-of-concept implementation calibrated to U.S. equity data shows that the actors learn the optimal policy with high accuracy and reveals a favorable asymmetry: the portfolio actor receives a cleaner learning signal than the auxiliary adversarial actor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的连续时间风险敏感基准资产配置方法，利用自由能-熵对偶性将问题转化为线性二次高斯随机微分博弈，并设计了连续时间q学习演员-评论家算法，在美股数据上验证了其高效性。
AI.motivation: 基准化资产配置问题无法直接适配标准马尔可夫随机控制框架（状态不可控，终端奖励含受控伊藤积分），需要开发新的求解方法。
AI.method: 利用自由能-熵对偶性将问题重述为等价概率测度下的线性二次高斯随机微分博弈，推导出显式的有限/无限时域鞍点解；基于此结构设计连续时间q学习演员-评论家方法（二次价值函数作为评论家，仿射鞍点控制作为演员）。
AI.result: 在美国权益数据上，演员以高精度学习到最优策略，并发现有利的不对称性：投资组合演员获得比对抗性演员更清晰的 learning signal。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具备经济可解释性（分数Kelly分解），并展示了基于模型的强化学习在连续时间风险敏感资产配置中的有效性。

title: Less is More: Lightweight Prompt Compression for Question Answering Applications on Edge Devices
summary: In agent-driven question answering (QA) applications, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is commonly introduced to enhance the response accuracy of large language models (LLMs) by providing additional context. Due to the inherent noise in retrieval results and the coarse granularity of document-level retrieval, the retrieved context often contains substantial redundant information. In this setting, the agent prompt, consisting of the user query and the associated retrieved context, leads to unnecessary computational overhead during LLM inference. Existing prompt compression methods typically rely on auxiliary small language models (SLMs) to estimate context importance. However, such approaches introduce significant memory and computational overhead, which limits their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this paper, we propose CORE, a two-stage sentence-level prompt compression method that eliminates the need for SLMs. In the first stage, CORE constructs an answer set via named entity recognition (NER) and a clue set via semantic matching. In the second stage, CORE refines the clue set using an orthogonal residual retrieval strategy and designs a spatial proximity-based metric to filter the answer set. The two sets are then combined to form the final compressed context. We implement CORE on an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin edge device and a Huawei Nova smartphone. Experimental results demonstrate that within a 2000-token budget, CORE improves accuracy by at least 30.19% compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while reducing memory usage by at least 50.47% and achieving at least 1.94 times speedup on the edge device. Moreover, compared to the state-of-the-art LLMLingua2 method, CORE achieves a substantial energy reduction of 95.74% on the smartphone, highlighting its practicality and generalizability for mobile deployments.

AI.tldr: CORE是一种两阶段句子级提示压缩方法，无需小语言模型，通过NER和语义匹配构建答案集和线索集，在边缘设备上实现更高精度、更低内存和能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统中检索上下文包含大量冗余信息，导致LLM推理产生不必要计算开销。现有提示压缩方法依赖辅助小语言模型（SLM），带来显著内存和计算负担，限制了在资源受限边缘设备上的部署。
AI.method: 提出CORE方法，分两阶段：第一阶段通过命名实体识别（NER）构建答案集，通过语义匹配构建线索集；第二阶段使用正交残差检索策略优化线索集，并设计基于空间邻近度的度量来过滤答案集，最终合并两集形成压缩上下文。
AI.result: 在2000 token预算下，CORE相比最先进基线准确率提升至少30.19%，内存使用减少至少50.47%，边缘设备加速至少1.94倍。相比LLMLingua2，智能手机端能耗降低95.74%。
AI.conclusion: CORE在无需小语言模型的情况下，实现了高效、轻量的提示压缩，显著提升了边缘设备上RAG系统的性能，具有良好的实用性和泛化性。

title: A Viscosity Semigroup Framework for Stable Image Reconstruction
summary: Starting from the axiomatic formulation of scale-space theory, we develop a viscosity-solution framework for multiscale image representations arising from degenerate elliptic-parabolic partial differential equations. Rather than introducing a new semigroup theory, we work within the standard viscosity-solution setting, using comparison principles to obtain well-posedness, uniqueness, and contraction in the supremum norm. This perspective is used to motivate a hybrid reconstruction operator in which a learned inverse map is followed by a nonlinear diffusion evolution. At the continuous level, the diffusion operator satisfies non-expansiveness, which provides stability for the reconstruction process; this framework is then evaluated on a CT-based mesothelioma classification task, where it attains an AUC of 0.875 with negligible variation across epochs, while the baseline model acquires AUC values from 0.49 to 0.80 without a clear convergence pattern. These observations are consistent with the stabilizing role suggested by the discussed viscosity theory.

AI.tldr: 本文从公理化的尺度空间理论出发，提出了一种基于粘性解框架的多尺度图像表示方法，通过退化椭圆-抛物偏微分方程实现。该方法采用比较原理确保适定性、唯一性和 supremum 范数下的压缩性。在此基础上，构建了一个混合重建算子，将学习到的逆映射与非线性扩散演化相结合。在 CT 间皮瘤分类任务中，该方法取得了 AUC 0.875 且跨 epoch 波动极小，而基线模型的 AUC 在 0.49 到 0.80 之间波动且无收敛趋势，验证了粘性理论所暗示的稳定化作用。
AI.motivation: 现有基于偏微分方程的尺度空间方法缺乏粘性解框架下的统一理论分析，且在学习驱动的重建过程中存在不稳定性问题，需要结合理论保证与学习方法的混合框架。
AI.method: 1) 从尺度空间公理化公式出发，采用粘性解框架处理退化椭圆-抛物偏微分方程；2) 利用比较原理证明适定性、唯一性和 supremum 范数压缩性；3) 构建混合重建算子：学习逆映射 + 非线性扩散演化；4) 在 CT 间皮瘤分类任务上评估。
AI.result: 所提方法在 CT 间皮瘤分类任务中 AUC 达到 0.875，且跨 epoch 波动极小；基线模型 AUC 范围为 0.49-0.80，收敛模式不清晰。
AI.conclusion: 粘性解框架能够为基于偏微分方程的图像重建提供理论稳定性保证，混合重建算子有效结合了学习方法的表达能力和扩散过程的稳定性，在医学图像分析中展现出显著优势。

title: On the Identifiability of User Adaptation in Co-Adaptive Neural Interfaces
summary: We analyze identifiability in co-adaptive human-machine systems. We show that closed-loop encoder estimates do not uniquely identify user adaptation, but instead reflect properties of the joint system. We discuss implications for interpreting behavioral adaptation and propose conditions for identification.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了共适应人机系统中的可辨识性问题，指出闭环编码器估计不能唯一识别用户适应性，而是反映联合系统的特性，并讨论了行为适应性解释的含义及识别条件。
AI.motivation: 揭示共适应人机系统中用户适应性估计的可辨识性问题，避免对用户行为适应性的错误解读。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，探讨闭环编码器估计与用户适应性之间的辨识关系，提出相应的识别条件。
AI.result: 发现闭环编码器估计不能唯一确定用户适应性，反映的是联合系统特性而非单纯用户行为。
AI.conclusion: 需要更谨慎地解读行为适应性指标，并提出了确保可辨识性的条件。

title: Composition: Building Community with Arts, Math, and Code (Experience Report)
summary: Composition (https://composition.codes) is a free event series on art, mathematics, and code. This experience report covers Composition's event structure, artist selection process, outreach efforts for submissions and event promotion, and the community response.

AI.tldr: Composition是一个关于艺术、数学和代码的免费系列活动，本文报告了其活动结构、艺术家选择过程、推广努力以及社区反馈。
AI.motivation: 分享Composition活动的组织经验，为类似跨学科社群活动提供参考。
AI.method: 通过经验报告形式，描述Composition的活动结构、艺术家遴选、征稿与宣传推广的具体做法。
AI.result: 形成了覆盖艺术、数学与代码的免费系列活动，并在社区中获得积极响应。
AI.conclusion: Composition活动模式可行且受到社区欢迎，其组织经验可为类似跨学科活动提供借鉴。

title: MoECodec: Image Compression for joint human and machine perception via Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Image compression for machines calls for a unified codec that serves multiple downstream vision tasks. Existing approaches either adopt task-specific end-to-end designs, raising parameter and deployment overhead, or rely on transfer-based adaptations that remain externally attached and heuristic task design. A key limitation shared by both lines of work is their largely static computation pattern, which applies similar transformations across tokens despite the fact that different image regions exhibit markedly different semantic importance and complexity for machine perception. We propose MoECodec, a token-aware image compression framework that supports multiple downstream tasks within a single model. MoECodec replaces the FFN layers in transformer-based compression model token-wise Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), enabling dynamic, token-level computation conditioned on the input content and task objective. To make MoE effective in compression model, we introduce a stable routing strategy that combines expert-choice routing with spatial total variation regularization to encourage spatially coherent assignments, and we propose a lightweight expert architecture, Group Shuffle MLP (GShMLP), to control parameter growth. Extensive experiments show consistent improvement against baselines on both conventional image reconstruction and machine tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出MoECodec，一种基于混合专家模型（MoE）的令牌感知图像压缩框架，通过动态、令牌级的计算模式，在单一模型中同时支持图像重建和多个下游机器视觉任务，显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像压缩方法要么采用任务特定的端到端设计导致参数和部署开销大，要么依赖迁移学习但计算模式静态，未能根据图像区域不同的语义重要性和复杂度进行差异化处理。
AI.method: 将Transformer压缩模型中的FFN层替换为令牌级混合专家模块（MoE），实现基于输入内容和任务目标的动态计算；提出结合专家选择路由与空间全变分正则化的稳定路由策略；设计轻量级专家架构Group Shuffle MLP（GShMLP）控制参数增长。
AI.result: 在传统图像重建和机器任务上均取得一致的性能提升，优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MoECodec通过令牌感知的动态计算和轻量级专家设计，有效解决了多任务图像压缩中的静态计算问题，实现了单一模型服务多种下游任务的目标。

title: Mitigating Adverse Selection in Concentrated Liquidity AMMs with Dynamic Fees: An Agent-Based Model Approach
summary: Automated Market Makers based on concentrated liquidity, such as Uniswap v3, significantly improve capital efficiency but expose Liquidity Providers (LPs) to adverse selection costs, formalized as Loss-Versus-Rebalancing (LVR). While theoretical literature quantifies these costs, the interplay between realistic blockchain microstructure and endogenous pricing mechanisms remains under-explored. This paper develops a granular Agent-Based Model of a Uniswap v3 pool interacting with a stochastic reference market governed by Heston volatility dynamics. The framework incorporates discrete block propagation, mempool latency, and a heterogeneous population of agents, including latency-sensitive arbitrageurs, smart routers, Maximal Extractable Value searchers, and active LPs benchmarked against a frictionless rebalancing strategy. We propose and evaluate dynamic fee schedules driven by volatility and order-flow toxicity proxies intended to compensate LPs for adverse-selection losses. Our simulations investigate the conditions under which LPs can achieve positive hedged Profit and Loss (fees minus LVR). The analysis suggests that dynamic fee adjustments can improve hedged LP profitability mainly by increasing fee income in states associated with stale-price risk. Depending on the configuration, these rules may also affect realized LVR, but the current aggregate results support compensation for LVR more directly than a reduction of LVR itself.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建基于智能体的Uniswap v3模型，模拟了区块链微观结构与随机参考市场的交互，评估了动态费用机制对流动性提供者（LP）对冲损失（LVR）的补偿效果。结果表明，动态费用主要通过增加费用收入来改善LP的盈利能力，而非直接降低LVR。
AI.motivation: 现有理论虽量化了集中流动性自动做市商（如Uniswap v3）中LP面临的逆向选择成本（LVR），但真实区块链微观结构与内生定价机制之间的相互影响尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了一个细粒度的基于智能体的模型，模拟Uniswap v3池与服从Heston波动率动力学的随机参考市场交互。模型包含离散区块传播、内存池延迟、多种异质智能体（延迟敏感的套利者、智能路由器、MEV搜索者、活跃LP），并提出了基于波动率和订单流毒性的动态费用机制。
AI.result: 动态费用调整主要通过在高风险状态下增加费用收入来改善LP的对冲后盈利能力；这些机制对实际LVR的影响有限，对LVR的补偿效果比直接降低LVR更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 动态费用规则能够帮助LP补偿逆向选择损失，但当前配置下更适合作为补偿机制而非减少LVR的手段。

title: Continuous Hidden Markov Models for Equity Returns: Heavy-Tail Emission Families and Regime-Conditional Value-at-Risk
summary: Synthetic generators of daily equity returns let practitioners stress test, backtest, and design scenarios that a single realized market history cannot supply, but only if the generator reproduces the stylized facts of real returns: heavy tails, negligible linear autocorrelation, and slow decay of the absolute-return autocorrelation. Hidden Markov models with few Gaussian states were long thought unable to reproduce that slow decay, and the standard fix was to abandon them for more complex hidden semi-Markov models. We revisit this issue with a continuous hidden Markov model whose regime chain governs the autocorrelation while per-regime densities govern the marginal, separating the temporal and distributional sides of the original failure. A unified expectation-maximization framework fits Gaussian, Student-t, Laplace, and generalized-error emissions under shared forward-backward recursions and quantile-based initialization, and a spectral identity bounds the number of decay modes by the rank of the centred transition matrix. Across SPY walk-forward folds, a sector-balanced 30-ticker panel, a CRSP cross-decade transfer, and a six-asset basket, that bound was not binding once a few states were used: heavy-tailed marginals, not additional decay modes, closed most of the fit gap, recovering volatility clustering above the i.i.d. baseline and narrowing the kurtosis gap without a tuning hyperparameter. The original failure is therefore distributional, not temporal. On daily US equities, a simple, interpretable Markov model suffices, and unlike a bootstrap or semi-Markov fit that wins only on a single-window fit, the fitted model also yields a regime-conditional Value-at-Risk that passes a joint conditional-coverage test and a copula that reproduces cross-asset correlations: one interpretable generator serving both path simulation and downstream risk and portfolio tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，对于美国日频股票收益，简单的连续隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）足以复现收益率的所有典型特征（重尾、无自相关、波动率聚集），其关键在于使用重尾分布（如Student-t）而非增加状态数，从而纠正了先前认为HMM无法捕捉自相关缓慢衰减的认知偏差。
AI.motivation: 合成日频收益率生成器需要复现真实收益的典型特征（重尾、无线性自相关、绝对值自相关缓慢衰减）。早期认为隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）无法实现缓慢衰减，导致研究者转向更复杂的隐半马尔可夫模型。本文重新审视这一问题，试图证明简单的HMM实际上可以胜任。
AI.method: 采用连续隐马尔可夫模型，其中状态链控制自相关结构，各状态内的密度分布控制边际分布特征。提出统一的期望最大化（EM）框架，支持高斯、Student-t、Laplace和广义误差分布，并共享前向-后向递归和基于分位数的初始化。通过谱恒等式将衰减模式数量限制为中心化转移矩阵的秩。
AI.result: 在SPY滚动窗口、30只股票均衡面板、CRSP跨十年迁移测试和六资产组合上，该界限在实践中并不紧：使用少量状态即可。重尾边际分布（而非额外衰减模式）弥补了大部分拟合差距，恢复了波动率聚集，缩小了峰度差距，无需调参。模型还通过了条件覆盖测试的VaR检验，并生成了重现跨资产相关性的copula。
AI.conclusion: 原始失败的原因在于分布假设，而非时间动态。对于日频美国股票，一个简单、可解释的马尔可夫模型就足够。与仅在单窗口拟合中胜出的bootstrap或半马尔可夫模型不同，该模型还能用于路径模拟以及下游风险和组合管理任务。

title: Investigating Linguistic Steering: An Analysis of Adjectival Effects Across Large Language Model Architectures
summary: Achieving reliable control of Large Language Models (LLMs) requires a precise, scalable understanding of how they interpret linguistic cues. We introduce a rigorous framework using Shapley values to quantify the steering effect of individual adjectives on model performance, moving beyond anecdotal heuristics to principled attribution. Applying this method to 100 adjectives across a diverse suite of models (including o3, gpt-4o-mini, phi-3, llama-3-70b, and deepseek-r1) on the MMLU benchmark, we uncover several critical findings for AI alignment. First, we find that a small subset of adjectives act as disproportionately powerful "levers," yet their effects are not universal. Cross-model analysis reveals a "family effect": models of a shared lineage exhibit correlated sensitivity profiles, while architecturally distinct models react in a largely uncorrelated manner, challenging the notion of a one-size-fits-all prompting strategy. Second, focused follow-up studies demonstrate that the steering direction of these powerful adjectives is not intrinsic but is highly contingent on their syntactic role and position within the prompt. For larger models like gpt-4o-mini, we provide the first quantitative evidence of strong, non-additive interaction effects where adjectives can synergistically amplify, antagonistically dampen, or even reverse each other's impact. In contrast, smaller models like phi-3 exhibit a more literal and less compositional response. These results suggest that as models scale, their interpretation of prompts becomes more sophisticated but also less predictable, posing a significant challenge for robustly steering model behavior and highlighting the need for compositional and model-specific alignment techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文使用Shapley值量化分析了100个形容词对LLM在MMLU基准上的影响，发现少数形容词具有强大的"杠杆"效应，但存在"家族效应"——同源模型敏感度相关，不同架构模型则无相关性；同时发现形容词的转向效果依赖于句法角色和位置，大模型表现出非加性的交互效应，而小模型反应更字面化，挑战了统一提示策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM提示控制缺乏精确、可扩展的理解方法，多依赖经验性启发而非严格的归因框架，需要建立更科学的形容词影响量化机制。
AI.method: 采用Shapley值归因框架，对100个形容词在多个模型（o3、gpt-4o-mini、phi-3、llama-3-70b、deepseek-r1）上的MMLU基准表现进行系统性量化分析，并进一步研究句法角色、位置和交互效应。
AI.result: 发现少数形容词充当不成比例的"杠杆"但非普适；存在"家族效应"——同源模型敏感度相关，不同模型无相关；大模型（如gpt-4o-mini）存在非加性交互效应（协同、拮抗、反转），小模型（如phi-3）反应更字面化。
AI.conclusion: 随着模型规模扩大，提示理解变得更复杂但更不可预测，挑战了鲁棒的模型行为控制，需要构建组合式且模型特定的对齐技术。

title: A Projection-Based Surrogate Gradient Interpretation for Neural Codec Wrappers
summary: Neural wrappers are learned pre-and postprocessing networks designed to enhance the performance of conventional video codecs. Although these approaches can significantly improve compression efficiency, training them remains challenging due to the non-differentiability of video codecs, which arises from the multiple discrete decisions involved in the encoding process. Surrogate gradients have recently emerged as an effective solution for enabling end-to-end learning with conventional codecs. They offer two main advantages: they avoid training an additional network to mimic the codec, and they can improve compression performance. In particular, the recently proposed SCALED method, which leverages the true compression error, has shown strong results for training neural pre-processors such as downscalers. However, this SCALED gradient was originally introduced as a reparameterization trick, which limits its interpretability. In this paper, we show that this surrogate gradient can be interpreted as a first-order local approximation of the video codec, providing insight into its effectiveness. We further demonstrate that it is effective not only for learning downscaling operations, but also for the more challenging task of full neural wrapping with pre-and post-processing networks. Finally, we show that the approach generalizes well across different video codecs, quality factors, and tasks, including multiple downscaling ratios, yielding BD-Rate (PSNR) reductions of up to -23.59% on x264 and -20.07% on VVenC relative to standard resampling baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将SCALED代理梯度解释为视频编解码器的一阶局部近似，并将其扩展到全神经包装（预处理+后处理）任务，在x264和VVenC上分别实现最高-23.59%和-20.07%的BD-Rate降低。
AI.motivation: 神经包装方法能提升传统视频编码性能，但由于编解码器不可微分，端到端训练困难。现有代理梯度方法（如SCALED）虽有效，但缺乏可解释性，且尚未验证其在完整神经包装任务上的效果。
AI.method: 将SCALED代理梯度重新解释为编解码器的一阶局部近似，并基于此设计端到端训练框架，同时学习预处理（下采样）和后处理（上采样）网络，适用于不同编解码器、质量因子和任务。
AI.result: 在x264上实现-23.59%的BD-Rate降低，在VVenC上实现-20.07%的BD-Rate降低，优于标准重采样基线，且方法在不同编解码器和质量设置下泛化良好。
AI.conclusion: SCALED代理梯度可作为编解码器的一阶局部近似，有效支持完整神经包装的学习，具有强泛化能力和显著的压缩增益。

title: Beyond Fixed Budgets: Characterizing the Inelasticity and Limitations of Tree-of-Thought Reasoning Strategies
summary: Tree of Thought (ToT) search has become a promising direction for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models, but deploying these methods in practice raises a question that has received little systematic attention: how do different search strategies behave under varying compute budgets, model sizes, and problem difficulties? In this work, we evaluate two representative ToT methods; DPTS, a Monte Carlo tree search based approach, and SSDP, a semantic deduplication based approach, across two mathematical reasoning benchmarks (Math500 and GSM8K), two model scales (Llama-3B and Llama-8B), and four token budgets (3k--10k). Our analysis reveals that the two methods exhibit limitations that pull in opposite directions. DPTS suffers from a cold-start bottleneck at low budgets: it requires sufficient exploration before its value estimates become reliable, making it a poor fit for resource-constrained settings despite strong scaling behavior at higher budgets. SSDP, on the other hand, reaches candidate solutions efficiently but is prone to frontier depletion; its aggressive node merging permanently discards unexplored paths, leaving it unable to improve regardless of how much budget remains. Together, these findings suggest that neither a fixed exploration strategy nor a fixed pruning strategy is sufficient across compute continuum. We argue that effective search for scientific reasoning agents requires strategies that can adapt their behavior based on search progress and available resources.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了两种树搜索方法（DPTS和SSDP）在不同计算预算、模型规模和问题难度下的表现，发现DPTS在低预算时存在冷启动瓶颈，而SSDP则因激进剪枝导致前沿耗尽，表明固定策略无法适应计算资源连续变化，需要自适应搜索策略。
AI.motivation: 树搜索方法（Tree of Thought）能提升大模型的推理能力，但不同搜索策略在不同计算预算、模型规模和问题难度下的行为差异尚未得到系统研究。
AI.method: 评估了两种代表性方法：DPTS（基于蒙特卡洛树搜索）和SSDP（基于语义去重），在Math500和GSM8K两个数学推理基准、Llama-3B和Llama-8B两个模型规模、以及3k-10k四种token预算下进行对比分析。
AI.result: DPTS在低预算时存在冷启动瓶颈（需要足够探索才能获得可靠估值），但在高预算时扩展性良好；SSDP能高效找到候选解，但因激进节点合并永久丢弃未探索路径，导致无法随预算增加而提升。
AI.conclusion: 固定探索策略或固定剪枝策略在计算资源连续变化时均不充分，科学推理智能体需要能根据搜索进度和可用资源自适应调整行为的搜索策略。

title: UI-LIC: A Unified Framework for Evaluating Learned Image Compression Models
summary: The evaluation and comparison of Learned Image Compression (LIC) systems is complicated by heterogeneous software stacks, varying training conditions, and divergent evaluation methodologies. To address these challenges, we introduce UI-LIC, an open-source software framework for evaluating LIC models. We integrate six high-performance LIC models, and provide a centralized controller for performing training, inference, and analysis with shared configuration parameters. Our GUI program offers a streamlined interface to evaluate these models alongside traditional video intra-frame encoders, equalizing the compressed bitrates and calculating quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM, VMAF, and LPIPS. Finally, we provide an interactive image analyzer with configurable quality heatmap overlays. Our framework lowers barriers to further LIC research, unlocking comparative metrics and subjective analysis with a single setup command. The open-source software is released under the MIT license and is available at github.com/BaylorMultimediaLab/UI-LIC.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了UI-LIC，一个开源软件框架，用于评估和比较学习型图像压缩（LIC）系统。该框架集成了六个高性能LIC模型，提供统一的训练、推理和分析控制器，并包含GUI程序，支持与传统视频帧内编码器进行比较，可配置压缩比特率并计算PSNR、SSIM、VMAF、LPIPS等质量指标，还提供交互式图像分析器。
AI.motivation: LIC系统的评估和比较因异构软件栈、不同训练条件和多样化的评估方法而变得复杂，亟需一个标准化的评估框架来降低研究门槛。
AI.method: 开发了UI-LIC开源框架，集成六个高性能LIC模型，提供集中式控制器用于训练、推理和分析，开发GUI程序进行模型对比，并实现交互式图像分析器（含可配置质量热图叠加）。
AI.result: 实现了多LIC模型与传统编码器在相同比特率下的公平比较，支持多种质量指标计算，提供了直观的交互式分析工具。
AI.conclusion: UI-LIC框架降低了LIC研究的门槛，通过单一设置命令即可解锁对比度量和主观分析，对推动LIC领域发展具有重要价值。

title: Anatomically Consistent TMJ Disc Segmentation via Semantic Anchoring and Clinical Priors
summary: Segmenting the temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disc from MRI is essential for accurate diagnosis of internal derangement, yet it remains unreliable in practice due to its small size, low contrast, and morphological variability. Existing methods, primarily adapted from general segmentation architectures, often produce fragmented or anatomically inconsistent masks, leading to unstable measurements of disc position and shape for downstream diagnosis. To address these challenges, we propose TISC, a TMJ disc segmentation framework that integrates semantic anchoring with clinical metadata-guided boundary refinement. The framework first establishes robust disc localization in the foundation model feature space via a Prototypical Semantic Anchoring (PSA) module that aggregates adjacent-slice MedDINOv3 features and derives a prototype-driven similarity map. It then performs targeted boundary refinement through a Clinical-Metadata Point Refinement (C-MPR) module, with point-wise predictions modulated by Mouth Open Limitation (MOL), a clinical indicator associated with disc displacement without reduction. On a large-scale cohort of 2,488 PD MRI volumes from 1,300 patients, our method achieves up to a 4.96 Dice improvement over strong baselines across diverse architectures, delivering more anatomically coherent and clinically reliable TMJ disc segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出TISC框架，通过原型语义锚定（PSA）和临床元数据引导的边界细化（C-MPR），在MRI中实现更准确、解剖学一致的颞下颌关节（TMJ）椎间盘分割，Dice提升达4.96。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对体积小、对比度低、形态多变的TMJ椎间盘分割不准确，常产生碎片化或解剖学不一致的掩膜，影响临床诊断。
AI.method: 采用PSA模块（利用相邻切片MedDINOv3特征与原型驱动相似度图）进行稳健定位，结合C-MPR模块（利用开口受限MOL临床指标指导逐点边界细化）。
AI.result: 在包含2,488例MRI（1,300名患者）的大规模队列上，相比多种强基线方法，Dice提升最高达4.96。
AI.conclusion: TISC能生成更解剖学一致且临床可靠的TMJ椎间盘分割，优于现有通用分割架构。

title: Post-Training Recipe, More Than Model Family, Shapes Multi-Agent LLM Conversational Behavior
summary: Multi-LLM systems use multiple language models to deliberate, judge each other's outputs, or coordinate as agents. Their value depends on the models producing measurably different conversational behaviors when given the same input. Prior offline studies recommend drawing one model per family for behavioral diversity, because LLMs prefer outputs from their own family when rating one another in isolation. Whether the same family label predicts behavior in interactive multi-LLM systems, the setting that real deployed systems use, has not been tested. We study this with a 940,000-chain 11-checkpoint corpus and a 1.6M-chain same-base Llama factorial. On our validated headline metric, hedging, a reasoning-distilled Llama checkpoint shifts by 18% depending on which same-base partner it replies to, more than any cross-family hedging gap in the controlled subset. Qwen, closed-API, and runtime checks suggest the pattern is not isolated, while repair and challenge analyses remain exploratory because their surface-cue detectors are weaker. Overall, the results identify post-training recipe as a first-class axis for multi-LLM panel composition and show that model family alone is an incomplete proxy for conversational diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实验发现，在交互式多LLM系统中，模型的训练后配方（post-training recipe）比模型家族（model family）更能预测对话行为差异，同一基础模型的不同训练版本之间的行为差异甚至超过跨家族模型。
AI.motivation: 先前研究建议从不同模型家族选取LLM以实现行为多样性，因为LLM在离线评价中偏好同家族输出。但实际部署的多LLM系统是交互式的，家族标签是否能预测交互行为尚未验证。
AI.method: 构建94万链、11个检查点语料库和160万链、同源Llama析因实验，以hedging（回避性措辞）为验证指标，分析交互行为差异；辅以Qwen、闭源API和运行时检查。
AI.result: 同一基础的推理蒸馏Llama检查点因回复不同伙伴而出现18%的hedging变化，超过受控子集中任何跨家族差异；修复和挑战分析的表面线索检测较弱，仍属探索性。
AI.conclusion: 训练后配方是多LLM面板组合的首要考量维度，仅凭模型家族不足以作为对话多样性的代理指标。

title: Jury Duty: Calibration and Orientation Failures in MLLM-as-a-Judge Under Cultural Ambiguity
summary: MLLM-as-a-Judge is conventionally validated by agreement with human annotations, but this metric is undefined when the human pool is culturally heterogeneous. We introduce VOIR DIRE, a multimodal benchmark of 626 culturally paired image--prompt artifacts spanning U.S. and mainland Chinese contexts across food, fashion, and architecture, with annotator pools that are within-pool reliable (a = 0.86/0.74) but cross-pool divergent on evaluation (Q1 r = -0.12). Across six MLLMs, the bias decomposes into two failures: a positivity-floor calibration failure (compressed scale use) and an orientation failure (default to one cultural norm). On this corpus, where contested items are sampled to split the two pools, the floor mechanically validates the more-permissive Chinese reading; persona prompting partially recovers calibration, but the orientation residual survives, evidence the tilt is not reducible to scale compression. Reference-pool in-context demonstrations deepen the orientation residual and inflate the high end rather than restoring use of the low end. Model origin adds a small additive tilt (~0.10 MAE) that is approximately invariant under demonstration. We recommend reporting alignment against each reference pool separately and treating cross-pool divergence as a judge property.

AI.tldr: 论文提出VOIR DIRE基准，发现MLLM裁判在跨文化评估中存在校准失败和定向偏差，建议分别报告各参考池的对齐情况。
AI.motivation: 传统MLLM裁判验证依赖与人类标注的一致性，但当人类标注者来自不同文化背景时，该指标无法定义，因此需要系统研究跨文化场景下的评估偏差。
AI.method: 构建包含626个中美文化配对图文样本的VOIR DIRE基准（涵盖食物、时尚、建筑），使用内部可靠但跨池分歧的标注者，测试6种MLLM，分析校准失败（刻度压缩）和定向失败（默认某一文化规范）两种偏差。
AI.result: 跨池相关性Q1 r = -0.12；校准失败机械地验证了更宽松的中文阅读；个性提示部分恢复校准但定向偏差残留；参考池上下文示例加深定向偏差；模型来源仅增加约0.10 MAE的小幅加性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 建议分别报告每个参考池的对齐情况，并将跨池分歧视为裁判本身的属性。

title: The New Associationism: Lessons from Deep Learning
summary: What can the success of modern AI tell us about how humans learn? This paper argues that taking AI seriously as a model of human learning supports a modest but genuine associationism. The central finding is that supervised learning -- learning driven by evaluative feedback -- underlies a surprisingly wide range of contemporary AI systems, from large language models to game-playing agents, differing primarily in how much work is required to generate the relevant feedback signal. This vindicates associationist ideals of a uniform, gradual, error-driven learning mechanism operating across domains, and defuses the once-influential argument that associationist mechanisms are too limited to account for human cognitive capacities. At the same time, the successes of deep learning depend on computational architectures that go well beyond anything classical associationists envisaged, and supervised learning operates within these as one component rather than a complete account of learning.

AI.tldr: 现代AI的成功表明，监督学习作为一种统一、渐进、误差驱动的学习机制，在多个领域普遍有效，这为主张人类学习是联想主义提供了支持，但同时也需要超越经典联想主义的复杂计算架构。
AI.motivation: 探讨现代AI的成功对于理解人类学习机制的启示，特别是检验联想主义在人类认知中的适用性。
AI.method: 通过分析监督学习在多种AI系统（从大语言模型到游戏智能体）中的核心作用，论证其作为统一学习机制的普遍性，同时对比经典联想主义与现代深度学习架构的差异。
AI.result: 监督学习是一种跨领域的统一学习机制，支持了温和的联想主义观点；但同时深度学习依赖的计算架构远超经典联想主义的设想。
AI.conclusion: 现代AI的成功为联想主义提供了新的证据，但也表明需要超越经典框架，将监督学习视为学习机制的一个组成部分而非全部。

title: Geometry Calibration in Tomography with a Differentiable Ray-Based Model
summary: Geometric misalignments between the nominal and true acquisition parameters in tomography degrade reconstructions. We propose a framework that jointly reconstructs the volume and calibrates the acquisition geometry for arbitrary source--detector configurations. The core of our framework is an x-ray transform operator whose gradients with respect to the acquisition geometry can be efficiently computed with a ray-tracing method of structure and computational complexity similar to those of the forward operator. We represent the volume in a B-spline basis to provide a continuously differentiable model. This results in a better-behaved optimization landscape compared to voxel-based representations. We validate our framework with CT, micro-CT, nano-CT, and positron emission tomography data under a variety of geometric misalignments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种联合重建体积和校准采集几何的框架，适用于任意源-探测器配置，通过可微分的X射线变换算子和B样条体素表示，在多种断层成像模式下有效解决了几何未对准问题。
AI.motivation: 断层成像中，标称与实际采集参数之间的几何未对准会降低重建质量，现有方法难以同时处理任意源-探测器配置下的联合校准与重建问题。
AI.method: 1）构建一个对采集几何参数可微的X射线变换算子，其梯度可通过与正向算子结构相似的光线追踪法高效计算；2）采用B样条基表示体积，提供连续可微模型，相比体素表示具有更优的优化景观。
AI.result: 在CT、micro-CT、nano-CT和PET等多种断层成像数据上，针对多种几何未对准情况均取得了有效验证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够通用地解决不同断层成像模式下的几何校准与联合重建问题，B样条表示有助于优化过程的稳定性。

title: EmoInstruct-TTS: Dual-Path Instruction-Guided Emotional Speech Synthesis
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Submitted to Interspeech 2026. Audio demos: https://huanyu-lab.github.io/EMOINSTRUCT-TTS
summary: Instruction-based controllable speech synthesis enables users to specify emotions through natural language. However, existing approaches often rely on coarse emotion labels and lack explicit modeling of fine-grained intensity. We propose EmoInstruct-TTS, a dual-path instruction-guided framework for emotional speech synthesis. We introduce Emotion2embed, a supervised semantic-acoustic emotion embedding covering 48 emotional states, including fine-grained categories and intensity levels. To infer embeddings from free-form instructions, we design an Instruction-Conditioned Emotion Flow Model (ICE-Flow) that generates acoustically grounded emotion representations. The inferred embeddings are integrated into an LLM-based synthesis pipeline to provide explicit emotional control while preserving semantic planning. Experiments show improved emotional controllability and speech naturalness over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出EmoInstruct-TTS双路径指令引导框架，通过Emotion2embed覆盖48种情感状态，结合ICE-Flow生成声学情感嵌入，实现细粒度情感控制。
AI.motivation: 现有可控语音合成方法依赖粗粒度情感标签，缺乏对细粒度情感强度的显式建模。
AI.method: 双路径指令引导框架，包含Emotion2embed（监督语义-声学情感嵌入，覆盖48种情感状态）和ICE-Flow（指令条件情感流模型），嵌入集成到LLM合成流水线。
AI.result: 相比强基线方法，情感可控性和语音自然度均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效从自然语言指令中生成细粒度可控的情感语音。

title: Beyond ROC-AUC: Operating-Point Performance Reporting for Biometric Verification
summary: A biometric verifier is often deployed with a strict false match budget, so only a narrow, low false match rate (FMR) slice of the score range is used. A reporting standard for this setting already exists. ISO/IEC 19795-1 asks for error rates at stated operating points, for the detection error tradeoff (DET) curve as the view of the trade-off between FMR and the false non-match rate (FNMR), and for an interval of uncertainty on every value. In practice, a single area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (ROC-AUC), the equal error rate (EER), or a verification accuracy is still reported as the resolution, which is a threshold-independent summary that the standard does not endorse. The full ROC-AUC averages the true match rate (TMR) with equal weight over the whole FMR range from 0 to 1, so almost all of its weight is placed where the system is never operated; low-FMR behavior can then be hidden, and the order of two systems can even be reversed. The guideline is revisited in this paper and tested against seven pretrained matchers across four modalities, face, voice, iris, and fingerprint, each reported with bootstrap confidence intervals and paired bootstrap tests. A system that looks stronger on full ROC-AUC is shown to be significantly worse at FMR = 10^-3. For face, a higher full AUC was obtained by FaceNet, whereas a higher TMR at FMR = 10^-3 was obtained by ArcFace, and both gaps were significant with non-overlapping intervals. Hence, the DET curve and the FNMR at a fixed FMR are re-iterated in this paper as the primary report, with ROC-AUC and EER retained as supplementary context.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑全范围ROC-AUC作为生物特征识别系统性能度量的有效性，指出其权重分布与实际低FMR应用场景不匹配，可能导致系统排序逆转。通过七种预训练匹配器在四种模态上的实验验证，建议以DET曲线和固定FMR下的FNMR为主要报告指标，ROC-AUC和EER仅作补充。
AI.motivation: 实际生物特征验证系统通常在严格的低误匹配率（FMR）预算下运行，但业界仍普遍使用全范围ROC-AUC、EER等阈值无关的汇总指标。这些指标对低FMR区域的行为不敏感，可能掩盖系统在真实部署场景中的表现差异，甚至颠倒系统优劣排序，需要重新审视报告标准。
AI.method: 回顾ISO/IEC 19795-1报告标准，在四种生物特征模态（人脸、语音、虹膜、指纹）上使用七个预训练匹配器进行实验，采用bootstrap置信区间和配对bootstrap检验，比较全范围ROC-AUC与固定FMR下FNMR两种度量对系统排序的影响。
AI.result: 全范围ROC-AUC表现更强的系统在FMR=10^-3时显著更差。人脸实验中，FaceNet获得更高全范围AUC，而ArcFace在FMR=10^-3时获得更高TMR，差异显著且置信区间不重叠。
AI.conclusion: 应重新坚持DET曲线和固定FMR下的FNMR作为主要报告指标，ROC-AUC和EER仅作为补充上下文信息保留。

title: Specifying AI-SDLC Processes: A Protocol Language for Human-Agent Boundaries
comment: Position paper with formal specification, failure rate analysis, and feasibility demonstration. Companion empirical paper and open-source implementation forthcoming
summary:
AI agents now participate as first-class team members across the software development lifecycle, yet no specification language exists for expressing the human-agent responsibility boundaries, approval gates, and governance constraints this collaboration requires. Existing approaches encode process in agent prompts (subject to drift), target adjacent domains (workflow management, business processes), or address only fragments (access control, approval gates).
  We propose a domain-specific language for specifying AI-SDLC processes as protocols, with formal syntax, well-formedness conditions, operational semantics, and enforcement invariants. The language distinguishes policy (declared intent) from mechanism (structural enforcement), enabling implementations to bound process non-determinism through primitives such as validation tokens and capability boundaries.
  Three results follow. A failure rate analysis shows that structural enforcement bounds system failure rates at a weighted product of agent and validator rates, while behavioral compliance permits cumulative or near-saturating growth. The 2+N team pattern (two human-in-control roles plus N specialized agent members) formalizes classical Separation of Duties for AI-SDLC. Kleene closure of orchestration loops and reflexive protocol-adherence validation emerge as design properties rather than special-case constructs.
  We position the contribution against multi-agent frameworks (MetaGPT), workflow specification (FlowAgent, BPMN extensions), and capability-based security (SAGA): the novelty lies in the specific integration, not any single primitive. A working implementation demonstrates feasibility; empirical evaluation is future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向AI-SDLC（AI辅助软件开发生命周期）的领域特定语言（DSL），用于正式定义人与AI代理之间的责任边界、审批门控和治理约束。该语言区分策略（声明意图）与机制（结构执行），通过验证令牌和能力边界等原语约束过程非确定性。研究发现，结构性执行能将系统故障率限制在代理与验证器成功率的加权乘积，而行为性合规则可能导致故障率累积或饱和增长。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理参与软件开发时，缺乏专门的语言来描述人机协作中的责任边界、审批门控和治理约束。现有方法要么将过程编码在代理提示中（易漂移），要么针对相邻领域（工作流管理、业务流程），或仅解决片段问题（访问控制、审批门控），无法满足AI-SDLC的完整需求。
AI.method: 提出一种领域特定语言（DSL），将AI-SDLC过程定义为协议，包含形式化语法、良构条件、操作语义和执行不变量。核心创新是将策略（声明的意图）与机制（结构性执行）分离，引入验证令牌和能力边界等原语来约束过程非确定性。同时提出2+N团队模式（两个人类管控角色加N个专业代理成员），形式化AI-SDLC中的经典职责分离原则。
AI.result: 三个主要结果：1）结构性执行将系统故障率限制在代理与验证器成功率的加权乘积，而行为性合规允许故障率累积或饱和增长；2）2+N团队模式形式化了AI-SDLC中的职责分离；3）编排循环的Kleene闭包和反射性协议遵循验证成为设计属性而非特例构造。
AI.conclusion: 该工作与MetaGPT等多代理框架、FlowAgent和BPMN扩展等流程规范方法、以及SAGA等基于能力的安全方法相比，创新在于特定的集成方式而非单个原语。已有工作原型验证了可行性，实证评估是未来工作。

title: PaaF: Raising the perceived quality of INR-Based Image Compression
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for image compression, offering a fundamentally different approach from traditional and learned codecs. Nevertheless, INR-based methods for image compression suffer from long encoding times and a consistent performance gap in classic quality metrics such as PSNR. In this work, we explore the potential of purely INR-based compression methods and we propose PaaF (Picture as a Function), a novel INR-based image codec that introduces improved architectural design, adaptive quantization, and an efficient entropy coding scheme. These components are designed to enhance rate-distortion performance while preserving the simplicity and parallelizability of INR-based decoding. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements over existing INR-based methods in both quantitative metrics and perceptual quality. These findings highlight the potential of INR-based approaches and contribute to narrowing the gap between functional representations and more established compression paradigms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PaaF，一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的图像压缩方法，通过改进架构设计、自适应量化和高效熵编码，在保持解码简单性和并行性的同时，显著提升了率失真性能和感知质量，缩小了INR与传统压缩范式之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有INR-based图像压缩方法存在编码时间长、PSNR等经典指标表现不佳的问题，作者希望探索纯INR压缩方法的潜力，缩小其与传统/学习型编解码器之间的性能差距。
AI.method: 提出PaaF（Picture as a Function）编解码器，包含三个关键组件：改进的架构设计、自适应量化机制、以及高效的熵编码方案，旨在优化率失真性能同时保持INR解码的简单性和可并行化特性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PaaF在定量指标和感知质量上均优于现有INR-based方法，取得了一致性的改进。
AI.conclusion: INR-based方法具有巨大潜力，PaaF有效缩小了功能表示与更成熟压缩范式之间的差距。

title: 2D Versus 3D Diffusion for In Silico Training of Interventional X-ray AI Models
summary: The ability to synthesize realistic X-ray images has catalyzed the development of AI models for X-ray image-guided procedures, which otherwise suffer from a lack of available annotated data. Prior work has demonstrated the effectiveness of mechanistic simulation of digitally reconstructed radiographs (DRRs) as a training data source for a myriad of tasks, including segmentation and anatomical landmark detection, with comparable or superior performance to real data training. However, mechanistic DRR synthesis still relies on the availability of annotated high-resolution anatomical models. Deriving these from CT images of real patients or specimens imposes an undesirable bottleneck on data quantity and variability. In this work, we explore two methods for synthesizing training data: (1) a 3D conditional latent diffusion model that generates CT volumes to use as inputs for mechanistic DRR generation without real, 3D anatomical models, and (2) a view-conditioned 2D diffusion model that produces synthetic X-rays. In controlled experiments, we demonstrate that synthetic 2D diffusion-based X-rays can be used to train an anatomical landmark detection model that generalized to real X-ray images with performance rivaling that of a model trained on real X-ray images. Thus, we provide preliminary evidence that synthetic, 2D diffusion-based training data can substitute for real X-ray data, identifying a promising avenue towards generating large, diverse datasets for training robust AI models in interventional X-ray imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了两种合成X射线训练数据的方法：3D条件潜扩散模型生成CT体素用于机械DRR合成，以及视图条件2D扩散模型直接生成合成X射线。实验表明，2D扩散生成的合成X射线训练出的解剖标志检测模型在真实X射线图像上的表现可与真实数据训练的模型媲美。
AI.motivation: 传统机械DRR合成依赖高分辨率解剖模型的可用性，而从真实患者CT图像获取这些模型存在着数据量和多样性的瓶颈，限制了AI模型在X射线引导介入手术中的训练数据获取。
AI.method: (1) 3D条件潜扩散模型：生成CT体素作为机械DRR生成的输入；(2) 视图条件2D扩散模型：直接生成合成X射线图像。通过受控实验评估其在解剖标志检测任务中的效果。
AI.result: 2D扩散模型生成的合成X射线在训练解剖标志检测模型时，泛化到真实X射线图像的性能与使用真实数据训练的模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 合成2D扩散生成的训练数据可以替代真实X射线数据，为生成大规模、多样化的数据集以训练鲁棒的介入X射线AI模型提供了有前景的途径。

title: Specific Domain Ontology Construction Using Large Language Models
summary: Ontologies are useful structures to organize and maintain information that can be understood both by humans and systems. However, since their manual crafting is a laborious task, many specific domains lack reference ontologies. The outstanding ability for understanding natural language demonstrated by the Large Language Models (LLMs) has motivated their application to aid on a variety of fields, including on ontology development. This work presents the experimentation with a technique that uses LLMs in the role of domain experts to build conceptual hierarchies for a given initial concept. Twenty ontologies automatically constructed for the domain of the Brazilian maritime territory (a.k.a the Blue Amazon) using GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 were then evaluated by human experts. The models were able to construct overall coherent conceptualizations of the domain, but none of the outputs was completely satisfactory as a representation of the context without refinement.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用GPT-3.5和GPT-4作为领域专家，为巴西海域（蓝亚马逊）自动构建了20个本体，经人工评估发现模型能生成连贯的概念层级，但输出均需进一步优化才能作为领域表征。
AI.motivation: 本体手工构建耗时费力，许多特定领域缺乏参考本体，因此需要利用LLM的自然语言理解能力来辅助本体开发。
AI.method: 使用GPT-3.5和GPT-4作为领域专家，针对给定初始概念自动构建概念层级，为巴西海域领域生成了20个本体。
AI.result: 模型能够构建出整体连贯的领域概念化结构，但没有任何一个输出在不经过精炼的情况下能完全令人满意地代表该领域。
AI.conclusion: LLM可以辅助本体构建，但自动生成的本体仍需人工 refinement 才能达到参考本体的质量标准。

title: A UAV-Based Multi-Modal Vision System for Automated Sideslope Deformation Monitoring and Hazard Detection
summary: Slope hazards constitute a major safety threat to expressway infrastructure, and their evolution is typically manifested as slow surface deformation. Conventional manual inspection suffers from low efficiency and inadequate operational safety, especially on severely deteriorated slopes. Accordingly, there is an urgent need for an automated, high-precision solution capable of large-area slope observation and analysis. This study aims to develop a highly automated workflow for slope hazard detection using Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-borne Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR). The proposed workflow consists of a shared data-acquisition and ground-surface extraction stage, a single-observation hazard-screening branch based on RandLA-Net, and a multi-epoch deformation-monitoring branch based on grid-wise elevation differencing. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed system, we conducted multiple UAV-borne LiDAR data-acquisition flights in real expressway slope environments. The results show that the workflow can extract usable ground-surface point clouds under vegetation cover, identify potential hazard zones from single-observation point clouds, and quantify centimeter-level elevation changes using multi-epoch grid differencing. This study establishes an end-to-end UAV-borne LiDAR-based workflow for slope inspection and demonstrates its feasibility through controlled experiments, field tests, and simulation-based validation, thereby providing an implementable solution for automated slope-hazard monitoring and intelligent early warning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无人机激光雷达（UAV-borne LiDAR）的高度自动化边坡灾害检测工作流，包含地面点提取、单次观测危险筛查（RandLA-Net）和多期变形监测（网格高程差分），通过实地实验验证了其在植被覆盖下提取地表点云、识别潜在危险区及量化厘米级形变的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统人工巡检边坡效率低、安全性差，尤其对于严重退化的边坡，亟需一种自动化、高精度、适用于大面积观测的边坡灾害检测方案。
AI.method: 构建端到端自动化工作流：①共享数据采集与地面点提取；②基于RandLA-Net的单次观测危险筛查分支；③基于网格高程差分的多期变形监测分支。
AI.result: 在真实高速公路边坡环境中，该工作流能提取植被覆盖下的地面点云，从单次观测点云中识别潜在危险区，并通过多期网格差分量化厘米级高程变化。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了基于无人机LiDAR的端到端边坡检测工作流，通过控制实验、现场测试和仿真验证证明了其可行性，为自动化边坡灾害监测与智能预警提供了可实施方案。

title: PEAR: Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate
summary: Multi-agent debate improves the reliability of large language models (LLMs) through iterative peer critiques. However, fixed topologies often introduce persistent positional biases, amplify unreliable agents, and cause high sensitivity to role assignments. We introduce \textit{Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate (PEAR)}, an inference-time protocol that dynamically reconfigures communication roles and sparse topologies across consecutive debate rounds. By strategically switching agent-to-role assignments based on evolving agent states, PEAR prevents any agent from permanently occupying a privileged network position or distributes influence more evenly across the debate. We theoretically characterize PEAR as an equivariant sparse router: it preserves accuracy under agent relabeling while reducing routing complexity and improving generalization. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across four reasoning benchmarks and six diverse LLM backbones demonstrate PEAR significantly improves average accuracy over the strongest debate baselines. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/PEAR.

AI.tldr: PEAR是一种排列等变自适应路由多智能体辩论协议，通过动态重新配置通信角色和稀疏拓扑，防止位置偏差并提升LLM推理准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的多智能体辩论方法使用固定拓扑结构，导致持续性位置偏差、放大不可靠智能体的影响以及对角色分配高度敏感，限制了LLM推理的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出PEAR协议，在连续辩论轮次中基于智能体状态动态切换角色分配并稀疏化通信拓扑，实现排列等变的自适应路由。
AI.result: 在四个推理基准和六个LLM骨干网络上，PEAR相比最强辩论基线显著提升了平均准确率。
AI.conclusion: PEAR通过动态角色重分配和稀疏路由有效解决了固定拓扑带来的偏差问题，提升了多智能体辩论的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Training-Free Semantic Correction for Autoregressive Visual Models
summary: Autoregressive visual models (AVMs) based on next-scale prediction have emerged as a prominent paradigm for image and video synthesis. However, decomposing the generation process into discrete scales with varying granularities in AVM makes semantic errors difficult to identify and correct, thereby undermining the quality of the final output. Prior efforts to enhance AVM can be categorized into training-based and training-free approaches. Although training-based efforts to enhance AVM generation quality come at substantial computational cost, existing training-free methods neglect intermediate generation states, leaving semantic errors undiagnosed and allowing them to accumulate into the final output. In this paper, we focus on training-free paradigms and propose Gazer, a framework that integrates multimodal large language model feedback into the AVM sampling loop for in-generation semantic correction. Concretely, Gazer operates via two cooperating stages: the Reflective Diagnosis stage diagnoses semantic errors from intermediate states, while the Semantic Correction stage rewinds and rectifies the generation trajectory to realign with the target prompt. Experiments on compositional image and video benchmarks demonstrate that Gazer improves semantic alignment and compositional accuracy across multiple AVMs without additional training.

AI.tldr: Gazer是一个无需额外训练的训练框架，通过集成多模态大语言模型反馈到自回归视觉模型的采样循环中，实现在生成过程中进行语义错误诊断和修正，从而提升图像和视频合成的语义对齐与组合准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视觉模型（AVMs）基于next-scale预测的生成方式，不同粒度的离散尺度使得语义错误难以识别和纠正，导致最终输出质量下降。基于训练的方法成本高昂，而现有的无训练方法忽略了中间生成状态，导致语义错误无法诊断并累积到最终输出中。
AI.method: 提出Gazer框架，包含两个协作阶段：(1) 反思性诊断阶段，从中间状态诊断语义错误；(2) 语义修正阶段，回退并纠正生成轨迹以重新对齐目标提示。该框架将多模态大语言模型反馈集成到AVM采样循环中。
AI.result: 在组合性图像和视频基准测试上的实验表明，Gazer在多个AVM上均能提升语义对齐和组合准确性，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: Gazer作为一种无训练方法，通过引入多模态大语言模型反馈实现了生成过程中的语义错误校正，有效提升了AVM的生成质量，为改进自回归视觉模型提供了新的思路。

title: Optimising Inpainting Data with Delaunay Averages
summary: Inpainting-based image compression usually stores an optimised subset of all pixel locations and their colour values. In the decoding phase, the missing data are approximated via inpainting. Since the reconstruction quality depends critically on the selection of the stored data, we introduce a novel feature type: We store the vertex locations of a Delaunay triangulation together with the average colour values inside all triangles. We show that combining this feature type with homogeneous diffusion inpainting creates an elegant mathematical formulation with a positive definite linear system of equations. Even a simple solver such as the conjugate gradient method allows the handling of large images. To make our Delaunay averages maximally adaptive to the image, we develop an efficient data optimisation strategy specifically tailored to them. It incorporates ideas successfully used in the stippling literature. Experiments show that our approach outperforms the popular inpainting with optimised colour values by a large margin. Last but not least, we discover a favourable scaling behaviour: Doubling the image resolution allows us to halve the percentage of stored data while maintaining the quality level. This is attractive for compressing modern high-resolution images, where even data densities below 1 % yield appealing reconstructions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Delaunay三角剖分顶点存储和三角形内平均颜色值的图像压缩方法，结合均匀扩散修复，在大幅降低存储数据量的同时保持高质量重建，尤其适用于高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于修复的图像压缩方法依赖于存储优化后的像素子集及其颜色值，重建质量对数据选择高度敏感，亟需更优的特征类型与优化策略来提升压缩效率和重建质量。
AI.method: 存储Delaunay三角剖分的顶点位置以及每个三角形内部的平均颜色值，结合均匀扩散修复进行解码；开发了专门针对该特征类型的高效数据优化策略，借鉴了stippling领域的成功思路。
AI.result: 该方法显著优于传统的优化颜色值修复方法；发现有利的缩放行为：图像分辨率翻倍时，仅需将存储数据比例减半即可保持相同质量；在数据密度低于1%时仍能获得令人满意的重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为高分辨率图像压缩提供了一种优雅且高效的解决方案，具有良好的扩展性和实际应用价值。

title: MindAlign: Decoding Inner Speech from fMRI Signals via Multimodal Embedding Alignment under Limited Data
summary: Decoding inner speech from non-invasive brain signals remains a fundamental challenge due to the absence of overt linguistic output, limited training data, and large inter-subject variability. Existing brain-to-text approaches often rely on task-specific decoder fine-tuning, which restricts scalability and complicates adaptation to new participants. We propose MindAlign, a decoupled two-stage brain-to-language framework that enables open-ended text generation from fMRI signals without modifying the underlying language model. The first stage learns a subject-specific neural-semantic alignment that maps fMRI activity into a shared multimodal semantic space, extracting a latent semantic sketch of the internally generated sentence. The second stage integrates this sketch with visual context to prompt a frozen multimodal language model for free-form generation. Experiments on fMRI data collected during silent image description demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms fMRI-only and random baselines. We further show that the learned semantic-to-language projection can generalize across subjects, enabling effective decoding when paired with subject-specific neural alignment. These results indicate that neural signals modulate semantic content beyond image-driven priors, supporting a scalable and modular direction for brain-to-text decoding.

AI.tldr: MindAlign提出了一种解耦的两阶段脑到语言框架，通过神经-语义对齐和冻结的多模态语言模型，实现从fMRI信号进行开放文本生成，无需微调语言模型即可跨被试泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的脑到文本方法依赖任务特定的解码器微调，可扩展性差且难以适应新被试；非侵入式脑信号解码内心言语面临缺乏显性语言输出、训练数据有限和被试间差异大等挑战。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段学习被试特定的神经-语义对齐，将fMRI活动映射到共享多模态语义空间，提取内心生成句子的潜在语义草图；第二阶段将该草图与视觉上下文结合，输入冻结的多模态语言模型进行自由文本生成。
AI.result: 在静默图像描述的fMRI数据上，MindAlign一致优于仅使用fMRI的基线和随机基线；学习的语义到语言投影可跨被试泛化，结合被试特定的神经对齐后能实现有效解码。
AI.conclusion: 神经信号能够调制超越图像驱动先验的语义内容，该方法为可扩展、模块化的脑到文本解码提供了新方向。

title: Open Annotations and Synthetic Data for Field Localisation in Indian Bank Cheques
summary:
Automated cheque processing requires localising key fields (date, legal amount, IFSC code, account number, signature, and payee name)
  before any recognition step. The IDRBT Cheque Image Dataset is, to our knowledge, the only public collection of Indian bank cheques, but it
  ships without field annotations and with no stated licence, so its redistribution terms are unclear. We address both limitations. First,
  we release six-field bounding-box annotations for all 112 cheques in the dataset, distributed annotations-only and keyed to the original
  filenames so that the IDRBT redistribution terms are respected. Second, we release 295 fully redistributable synthetic cheque images
  produced by a cut-paste pipeline that composites annotated field regions from real cheques onto content-erased, bank-specific canvas
  templates; because patches are pasted at their source coordinates, annotations carry forward unchanged. Third, we provide a ResNet-50
  direct-regression baseline that predicts all six fields in a single forward pass, and use it for a controlled test of the synthetic data.
  The test is sobering: because cheque layouts are rigid, a no-learning baseline that simply predicts each field's mean training box already
  reaches 0.691 mean IoU and 80% accuracy at IoU >= 0.5, and once seed variance and training compute are accounted for, the cut-paste
  synthetic data yields no measurable improvement over real data alone (an equal-compute real-only model matches or beats the
  synthetic-augmented model on every aggregate metric). We report this negative result in full, since it cautions against assuming
  appearance-only augmentation helps fixed-layout documents and points instead to layout-varying synthesis. The annotations and synthetic
  images are released as reusable resources on the Hugging Face Hub under permissive licences.

AI.tldr: 本文针对IDRBT支票数据集缺乏标注和许可不明确的问题，发布了112张真实支票的六字段边界框标注和295张可完全再分发的合成支票图像，并验证了在固定布局文档中，仅基于外观的合成数据增强无法带来显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: IDRBT支票数据集是唯一的印度银行支票公开数据集，但缺乏字段标注且许可不明确，限制了其在自动支票处理研究中的应用。
AI.method: 1) 为112张真实支票提供六字段边界框标注；2) 通过裁剪-粘贴流程生成295张合成支票图像；3) 使用ResNet-50直接回归模型作为基线进行对比实验。
AI.result: 无学习基线（预测均值框）已达到0.691 mIoU和80%的IoU≥0.5准确率；合成数据增强在等计算量下未带来可衡量的改进。
AI.conclusion: 固定布局文档中，仅外观增强作用有限，需考虑布局变化的合成方法；发布的标注和合成数据可在Hugging Face Hub上获取。

title: Darwin Mobile Agent: A Roadmap for Self-Evolution
summary: The goal of artificial intelligence is to create agents capable of general, adaptive behaviour in open-ended environments. Guided by the "Bitter Lesson", we argue that the most effective path toward this goal is to systematically remove human priors and allow intelligence to naturally emerge through interaction with a "Big World" that is orders of magnitude more complex than the agent itself. We propose the mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) as a practical proxy for such a world and introduce Darwin Mobile Agent, an open-source infrastructure designed as a foundation for autonomous reinforcement learning in this domain. This framework addresses the data-collection bottleneck in real-world mobile interactions by using an asynchronous agent-environment loop across parallel cloud-phone instances. We further propose a conceptual roadmap to systematically remove human priors from three fundamental pillars of a self-evolving agent: task curricula, outcome verification, and memory management. We validate that the Darwin infrastructure provides the stability and scalability required for the first stage of this roadmap: policy optimisation in the GUI domain. This work establishes the practical and theoretical foundation necessary to move toward truly autonomous, self-evolving GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 提出通过移动GUI作为“大世界”代理，借助无人类先验的自主强化学习框架Darwin Mobile Agent，从任务课程、结果验证和记忆管理三个维度逐步实现自我进化的GUI智能体。
AI.motivation: 当前AI依赖大量人类先验知识，限制了通用适应性智能的发展。为了遵循"Bitter Lesson"，需要系统性地移除人类先验，让智能在复杂开放环境中自然涌现。
AI.method: 提出Darwin Mobile Agent框架，采用异步智能体-环境循环机制，在并行云手机实例上进行数据采集和强化学习；同时设计三阶段路线图，逐步移除任务课程、结果验证和记忆管理中的人类先验。
AI.result: 验证了Darwin基础设施在GUI策略优化阶段所需的稳定性和可扩展性，为后续自主进化奠定了工程基础。
AI.conclusion: 移动GUI是通向通用自主智能的有效代理环境，Darwin框架为构建真正自我进化的GUI智能体提供了必要的实践和理论基础。

title: Catching Lies Without Sending the Video: Privacy-Preserving Multimodal Deception Detection
summary: Frontier multimodal models can guess whether a person is lying from a testimony video. To do so, they stream that raw face and voice to a third-party model. We ask whether the heavy media is needed at all. On the Real-life Trial Deception dataset, Whissle on-device speech and vision stack extracts a compact digest: transcript, emotion, age, gender, intent distributions, a deception intent filter, fluency and rhythm, per-frame facial behaviour, and prosody. Under speaker-independent evaluation, we report three findings. A small classifier on this digest reaches AUC 0.741, matching Gemini 2.5 Pro on full video. Handing the digest to a frontier LLM reaches AUC 0.755 with Claude Opus 4.8 at 7.8X fewer input tokens, with no media leaving the device. The reported 75% accuracy is a speaker-leakage artifact. We release code and experiments.

AI.tldr: Whissle方法通过提取视频的紧凑摘要（文本、情绪、年龄、性别、意图等），在谎言检测任务上达到与Gemini 2.5 Pro处理完整视频相当的AUC 0.741-0.755，同时减少7.8倍输入token且无需离开设备传输原始媒体数据。
AI.motivation: 探索在多模态谎言检测任务中，是否真的需要将原始面部和语音数据流式传输给第三方模型，以及能否通过提取紧凑摘要来替代。
AI.method: Whissle设备端语音和视觉堆栈从视频中提取紧凑摘要（包括转录、情绪、年龄、性别、意图分布、谎言意图过滤、流利度与节奏、逐帧面部行为、韵律特征），然后使用小型分类器或前沿LLM（如Claude Opus 4.8）基于该摘要进行谎言检测。
AI.result: 小型分类器在摘要上达到AUC 0.741，与Gemini 2.5 Pro处理全视频相当；Claude Opus 4.8达到AUC 0.755，输入token减少7.8倍，且无媒体数据离开设备。报告中的75%准确率是说话者泄露的伪影。
AI.conclusion: 不需要传输原始面部和语音数据，通过设备端提取紧凑摘要即可达到与前沿多模态模型相当的谎言检测性能，同时大幅降低传输开销和保护隐私。

title: A Skin-Tone-Aware Dual-Representation Remote Photoplethysmography Framework for Contactless Respiratory Rate Estimation
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables. Keywords: respiratory rate estimation, remote photoplethysmography (rPPG), skin-tone awareness, dual-representation learning, contrastive learning, RR-rPPG dataset, COHFACE
summary:
Respiratory rate is a vital indicator of pulmonary and cardiovascular health, yet conventional methods for estimating respiratory rate are often intrusive due to their contact-based nature. Remote photoplethysmography offers a promising non-contact alternative and has been widely used for heart rate estimation; however, its potential for respiratory rate estimation remains underexplored. Existing methods typically adapt green and chrominance-based projections originally designed for heart rate estimation, which only partially capture respiratory dynamics. Most prior work focuses on the Eulerian representation with fixed or empirically selected RGB projections.
  To address these gaps, we propose a skin-tone-aware dynamic RGB signal projection that captures respiratory information. To mitigate the sensitivity of the Lagrangian representation to non-respiratory motion, we introduce a denoising network for motion-based remote photoplethysmography signals. We further design a phase-independent contrastive loss that enables Eulerian and Lagrangian representations to collaboratively learn respiratory rate information. We also introduce RR-rPPG, a respiratory-rate facial video dataset with Indian demographic representation.
  We evaluate the method on RR-rPPG and the publicly available COHFACE dataset, where it consistently outperforms comparison methods and achieves up to a 42.1% reduction in mean absolute error across the evaluated settings.
  The proposed framework demonstrates the effectiveness of jointly leveraging skin-tone-aware Eulerian and denoised Lagrangian representations for contactless respiratory rate estimation from facial videos. In addition, RR-rPPG contributes a diverse benchmark resource for future research in remote respiratory monitoring. The code and dataset will be made publicly available upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合利用肤色感知欧拉表示与去噪拉格朗日表示的无接触呼吸率估计方法，并在新构建的RR-rPPG数据集和公开COHFACE数据集上实现了最优性能，平均绝对误差降低最高达42.1%。
AI.motivation: 传统接触式呼吸率监测方法具有侵入性，而现有基于远程光电容积描记法的非接触呼吸率估计方法多沿用为心率估计设计的投影方法，未能充分捕获呼吸动态信息，且拉格朗日表示对非呼吸运动敏感。
AI.method: 1) 提出肤色感知的动态RGB信号投影以捕获呼吸信息；2) 引入去噪网络以减轻拉格朗日表示对非呼吸运动的敏感性；3) 设计相位无关对比损失，使欧拉表示与拉格朗日表示协同学习呼吸率信息；4) 构建包含印度人口统计特征的RR-rPPG面部视频数据集。
AI.result: 在RR-rPPG和COHFACE数据集上，所提方法一致优于对比方法，平均绝对误差最高降低42.1%。
AI.conclusion: 联合肤色感知欧拉表示与去噪拉格朗日表示能有效实现无接触呼吸率估计；RR-rPPG数据集为远程呼吸监测研究提供了多样化的基准资源。

title: VeriBound: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Process Reward Models Trained with Formal Verification Tools
summary: Process Reward Models (PRMs) provide step-level verification for Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet their training data acquisition remains a bottleneck: human annotation is costly and Monte Carlo roll-out estimates are noisy. A recent approach, FOVER, trains PRMs on step-level error labels automatically annotated by formal verification tools such as Z3 and Isabelle, and empirically observes cross-task generalization from symbolic tasks to diverse reasoning benchmarks. However, this generalization phenomenon lacks any theoretical explanation, and no formal bounds exist on the generalization error, sample complexity, convergence rate, or downstream Best-of-K performance of such PRMs. We propose VeriBound, a theoretical framework that provides PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds for PRMs trained with formal verification tools. We establish four main results: (i) a PAC-Bayesian generalization bound that relates the empirical verification error on formal-verification-annotated training data to the expected error on unseen reasoning tasks, with the bound depending on the formal verification accuracy and the divergence between training and test task distributions; (ii) a sample complexity result showing that $O(d \log(d/δ) / ε^2)$ formal-verification-annotated examples suffice to achieve generalization error $ε$ with probability $1-δ$, where $d$ is the complexity of the PRM hypothesis class; (iii) a convergence analysis proving that PRM training with formal verification labels converges at a linear rate under $L$-smoothness and bounded variance conditions; and (iv) an error propagation bound that relates step-level verification error to Best-of-K performance degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriBound理论框架，首次为形式化验证工具训练的PRM提供了PAC-Bayesian泛化界，包含四个核心理论结果：泛化误差界、样本复杂度、线性收敛率以及步级验证错误到Best-of-K性能退化的传播界。
AI.motivation: FOVER等方法观察到基于形式化验证工具训练PRM可实现跨任务泛化，但这一现象缺乏理论解释，且缺乏关于泛化误差、样本复杂度、收敛率和下游Best-of-K性能的正式界。
AI.method: 提出VeriBound理论框架，利用PAC-Bayesian理论推导泛化界，分析形式化验证精度与训练-测试任务分布散度对泛化的影响，并建立样本复杂度、收敛速率和错误传播的理论结果。
AI.result: 四个主要理论结果：(i) PAC-Bayesian泛化界；(ii) O(d log(d/δ)/ε²)的样本复杂度；(iii) L-平滑和有界方差条件下的线性收敛率；(iv) 步级验证错误到Best-of-K性能退化的传播界。
AI.conclusion: VeriBound首次为形式化验证训练PRM提供了系统的理论基础，填补了该领域理论分析的空白。

title: Shear-Free Viewport Magnification for 360-Degree via Spherical Mobius Boosts
summary: Viewport-adaptive 360-degree imaging seeks to allocate a fixed sampling budget to the region a viewer is likely to observe. Existing view-biased projections increase viewport resolution through non-conformal warps, which can introduce anisotropic stretching and shear. We formulate spherical Mobius boosts as exact conformal maps for fixed-budget viewport magnification. The continuous spherical warp has quasiconformal dilatation K = 1, reallocating samples toward a target direction while preserving local angles. On a SUN360 saliency audit with 72 panoramas and 216 paired viewport targets, C1 Mobius boosting improves viewport PSNR over optimized offset cubemap on all paired cases, with case-level median gain +3.26 dB, image-level median gain +3.23 dB, and panorama-level bootstrap 95% CI [+3.15, +3.33] dB. Pareto analysis shows that this is not a free global-quality improvement: C1 trades full-sphere WS-PSNR for shear-free viewport fidelity. Prediction-error and filtering studies identify the operating envelope: strong boosts are useful for accurately targeted viewports, while large target uncertainty calls for weaker boosts or fallback. These results position Mobius boosting as a geometric primitive for prediction-conditioned foveated 360-degree resampling rather than a universal encode-once layout.

AI.tldr: 本文提出球面Möbius变换作为保角映射用于360度视口自适应成像，在固定采样预算下实现无畸变的视口放大，相比优化偏移立方图在PSNR上获得中位数+3.23 dB的提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视口的投影方法通过非共形扭曲增加视口分辨率，会引入各向异性拉伸和剪切畸变，需要一种保角变换来在固定采样预算下实现视口放大同时保持局部角度不变。
AI.method: 将球面Möbius变换公式化为精确的共形映射（拟共形膨胀系数K=1），实现固定预算下的视口放大，重新分配采样点朝向目标方向同时保持局部角度。
AI.result: 在SUN360数据集（72张全景图、216对视口目标）上，C1 Möbius增强在所有配对案例中均优于优化偏移立方图，案例级中位数增益+3.26 dB，图像级中位数增益+3.23 dB，全景级bootstrap 95%CI为[+3.15, +3.33] dB。
AI.conclusion: Möbius增强定位为预测条件驱动的注视点360度重采样的几何基元，而非通用的一次编码布局；强增强适用于精确目标视口，大目标不确定性需较弱增强或回退方案。

title: Path-dependent program induction under resource constraints explains human sequence learning
