summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) has established itself as a pivotal technique for compressing large pre-trained language models. However, existing methods that force a student to strictly mimic the teacher's sentence embeddings or internal features often incur prohibitive computational costs and yield suboptimal performance due to the inherent capacity gap. To address these challenges, we propose TALAS (Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Sharpness-aware minimization), a unified framework that synergizes hierarchical (multi-layer) alignment with robust optimization. First, we introduce a Teacher-Anchored mechanism that selectively distills final sentence embeddings only into the student's upper layers, thereby reducing overhead while respecting capacity constraints. Second, we bridge the semantic gap in lower layers via Layer-Aligned Self-Distillation, which propagates knowledge top-down using internal geometric relational constraints in the embedding space. Finally, to prevent the student from memorizing point-wise teacher noise, we integrate Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization (ASAM) into the training objective, guiding the model towards flat minima for enhanced generalization. Empirical results on standard sentence embedding benchmarks demonstrate that TALAS consistently outperforms strong distillation baselines while achieving superior training efficiency in terms of computational cost and memory footprint.

AI.tldr: TALAS提出了一种结合层次化对齐与锐度感知优化的知识蒸馏框架，通过教师锚定机制、层对齐自蒸馏和自适应锐度感知最小化，在句子嵌入任务上实现了更优的性能和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法要求学生模型严格模仿教师模型的句子嵌入或内部特征，导致计算成本高昂，且由于师生模型之间的能力差距，性能提升有限。
AI.method: 1) 教师锚定机制：仅将教师的最终句子嵌入蒸馏到学生的上层，降低开销并尊重容量约束；2) 层对齐自蒸馏：利用嵌入空间中的内部几何关系约束，自上而下将知识传播到学生低层；3) 自适应锐度感知最小化(ASAM)：防止学生记忆教师逐点噪声，引导模型收敛到平坦最小值以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在标准句子嵌入基准测试中，TALAS一致优于强蒸馏基线方法，同时在计算成本和内存占用方面实现了更优的训练效率。
AI.conclusion: TALAS通过层次化对齐与鲁棒优化相结合，有效解决了师生能力差距和计算开销问题，为知识蒸馏提供了一种统一且高效的框架。

title: A Neurosymbolic Framework for Interpretable Skeleton-Based Seizure Detection via Concept-Driven Logical Reasoning
summary: Video-based seizure detection is essential for the management of epilepsy patients, offering a non-invasive complement to electroencephalography. While several deep learning approaches have been developed for video-based seizure detection, none are inherently interpretable, limiting their adoption and translation into clinical practice. We present, to our knowledge, the first exploration of a neurosymbolic framework for video-based seizure detection that directly addresses this gap. Our approach (1) extracts patient-centric skeleton sequences from epilepsy monitoring units via a prompt-guided foundation model, (2) predicts binary spatio-temporal concept activations grounded in clinical motor semiology guidelines, and (3) composes them via differentiable logic into interpretable Boolean rules with auditable contributions. Furthermore, to mitigate false positives arising from the traditional binary formulation (seizure vs.\ non-seizure), we sub-classify non-seizure segments into clinically relevant normal activities, providing the model with fine-grained discriminative supervision. Evaluated on two public seizure video benchmarks, our framework achieves 89.78% sensitivity with 0.06 false detections per hour on SAHZU and 85.27%,0.09 on IEEE, while producing complete three-level interpretability: every prediction decomposes into which motor primitives were detected, how they were logically composed, and how much each rule contributed to the clinical decision. We publicly release all annotations, extracted pose sequences, our data pipeline and code, https://github.com/Mr-TalhaIlyas/CDSD/.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出神经符号框架用于视频癫痫检测，结合骨架提取、概念激活和可微逻辑推理，实现高灵敏度（89.78%/85.27%）和低误报率（0.06/0.09次/小时），并提供完整的三层可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的视频癫痫检测方法缺乏可解释性，限制了临床转化应用。作者旨在通过神经符号方法直接解决这一可解释性缺口。
AI.method: (1) 利用提示引导的基础模型从癫痫监测单元提取以患者为中心的骨架序列；(2) 基于临床运动半定量学指南预测二值时空概念激活；(3) 通过可微逻辑将这些概念组合成可解释的布尔规则。此外，通过将非癫痫片段细分为临床相关正常活动来减少误报。
AI.result: 在SAHZU数据集上达到89.78%灵敏度、0.06次/小时误报；在IEEE数据集上达到85.27%灵敏度、0.09次/小时误报。实现完整的三层可解释性：检测的运动基元、逻辑组合方式及每条规则的贡献度。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号框架在视频癫痫检测中兼具高性能与可解释性，有望推动临床采纳，且作者已公开全部代码和标注数据。

title: Don't Blindly Trust It: How Unreliable Feedback Breaks Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented agents are typically evaluated by their gains under reliable external feedback. Yet these gains leave open a key counterfactual: when feedback is unreliable, would the agent be better off receiving no task evidence? We study this question with a controlled matched-loop comparison that fixes the agent loop, prompt, action space, and decoding, while varying only the returned observation: faithful, misleading, or absent. Across question answering and fact verification, persistent misleading feedback produces a value inversion: agents that benefit from clean tools can perform worse than the matched no-feedback fallback. On HotpotQA, Qwen2.5-7B reaches 44.8 F1 with clean retrieval and 22.3 F1 with no feedback, but drops to 4.7 F1 under shuffled retrieval. The inversion persists under stronger clean retrieval and locally plausible distractors, but weakens when later clean evidence can repair the trajectory. Early trajectory signals predict many failures, yet simple repairs remain fallback-limited: rejecting bad evidence helps only when the exposed fallback is reliable. These results show that clean-tool gains can overstate tool value, and that matched no-feedback fallback controls are necessary for evaluating tool-augmented agents.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在不可靠反馈下，工具增强型智能体的性能可能低于无反馈的基线，揭示了清洁工具增益可能高估工具价值，并提出需要匹配的无反馈对照来评估智能体。
AI.motivation: 探究当外部反馈不可靠时，工具增强型智能体是否比完全没有任务证据的情况更差，即清洁工具增益是否可能高估工具的真实价值。
AI.method: 采用受控匹配循环比较方法，固定智能体循环、提示、动作空间和解码方式，仅改变返回的观测结果（忠实、误导、缺失），在问答和事实验证任务上进行实验。
AI.result: 持续性的误导性反馈会导致价值反转：清洁工具下Qwen2.5-7B在HotpotQA上F1为44.8，无反馈为22.3，但在打乱检索下降至4.7。反转在更强清洁检索和局部合理干扰下依然存在，但在后续清洁证据可修复轨迹时减弱。
AI.conclusion: 清洁工具增益可能高估工具价值，匹配的无反馈对照控制是评估工具增强型智能体的必要方法。

title: The Language-Energy Divide: Measuring Energy Costs of Multilingual LLM Inference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in multilingual settings, yet the energy costs of serving these models across different languages remain poorly understood. We present a systematic study of inference energy consumption across languages with ML.Energy framework (Chung et al., 2026). We find striking disparities: energy consumption per output token varies by up to 8.3 times across languages, while total energy for a fixed set of requests varies by up to 179 times between the cheapest (English, 17.6 kJ) and the most expensive (Pashto, 3,147 kJ) languages. Our analysis shows that this disparity is driven by two compounding factors: (1) higher per-token energy costs for languages using complex or rare scripts, and (2) more tokens generated for low-resource languages. Moreover, we find a double cost + performance penalty: languages with the highest energy footprints also tend to achieve the lowest task accuracy. We reveal that the energy divide persists across models, hardware, and tasks, suggesting a systemic energy inequity in multilingual LLM deployment. Finally, we recommend that the community treat energy as a first-class evaluation axis, extend reporting checklists and model cards to include it, and adopt deployment-side mitigations for better energy efficiency.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在多语言部署中存在显著的能源不平等：不同语言间的推理能耗差异可达179倍，且能源消耗高的语言往往性能更差。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地被部署在多语言环境中，但不同语言的服务能耗成本尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 使用ML.Energy框架，系统性地测量和分析不同语言在LLM推理中的能源消耗。
AI.result: 每输出token的能耗跨语言差异高达8.3倍；固定请求集的总能耗在英语（17.6 kJ）和普什图语（3,147 kJ）之间差异达179倍；高能耗语言往往任务准确率更低。
AI.conclusion: 多语言LLM部署存在系统性能源不公平，建议将能源作为评估维度，纳入报告清单和模型卡片，并采取部署端缓解措施以提高能源效率。

title: Few-Shot Hyperspectral Aphid Detection via FastGAN Synthetic Data Generation, Transformer-Based Classification and Explainable AI
summary: Early detection of aphid infestation in crops is essential for preventing yield loss and reducing unnecessary pesticide use. Hyperspectral imaging combined with Spectral Information Divergence (SID) analysis offers a non-destructive approach for monitoring plant health; however, deep learning methods applied to hyperspectral data are often limited by small dataset sizes. In this study, a data-efficient generative adversarial network (FastGAN) was employed to augment a hyperspectral SID dataset of faba bean leaves containing healthy and aphid-infested samples. The trained generator produced 10,000 synthetic images preserving structural and spectral characteristics of real samples. Image quality was evaluated using Frechet Inception Distance (FID), demonstrating stable convergence and realistic reconstruction of leaf morphology and infestation patterns. The augmented dataset was used to train four classification architectures: VGG16, ResNet-50, EfficientNet, and Vision Transformer (ViT). Results showed that dataset augmentation significantly improved classification robustness, with performance progressively increasing from classical convolutional networks to transformer-based models. The ViT model achieved the highest accuracy and F1-scores, while EfficientNet provided strong balanced performance and ResNet-50 showed moderate improvements over VGG16. Confusion matrix analysis confirmed reduced false negatives and improved disease detection when using advanced architectures. The findings demonstrate that FastGAN-based augmentation effectively enhances hyperspectral plant disease classification and that transformer-based models provide the most reliable discrimination between healthy and infested leaves.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FastGAN对蚕豆叶片的高光谱SID数据集进行增强，生成10,000张合成图像，并结合VGG16、ResNet-50、EfficientNet和Vision Transformer四种分类架构进行蚜虫侵染检测。结果表明，数据增强显著提升分类鲁棒性，其中Vision Transformer模型表现最佳，实现了健康与受侵染叶片的最可靠区分。
AI.motivation: 早期检测作物蚜虫侵染对于减少产量损失和农药使用至关重要，但高光谱深度学习方法常受限于小数据集规模，亟需一种数据高效的增强策略。
AI.method: 采用FastGAN生成10,000张保留真实样本结构和光谱特征的合成图像，使用FID评估图像质量，随后用增强数据集训练VGG16、ResNet-50、EfficientNet和Vision Transformer四种分类架构。
AI.result: FastGAN生成的合成图像具有逼真的叶片形态和侵染模式；数据增强显著提升所有模型的分类鲁棒性；ViT模型在准确率和F1分数上表现最优，EfficientNet提供均衡性能，ResNet-50较VGG16有中等程度提升。
AI.conclusion: FastGAN增强策略能有效提升高光谱植物病害分类性能，其中基于Transformer的模型在区分健康与受侵染叶片方面最为可靠。

title: AutoRAS: Learning Robust Agentic Systems with Primitive Representations
summary: The automated design of agentic systems offers a promising pathway for scaling large language models (LLMs) beyond single-agent reasoning. While prior work has advanced task performance through handcrafted or automatically generated multi-agent workflows, robustness is often treated as an afterthought, leaving systems vulnerable to external adversaries and internal failures. We propose AutoRAS, a framework for the Automated design of Robust Agentic Systems. AutoRAS formulates system design as generating a sequence of symbolic primitives that jointly encode structural connectivity and behavioral actions, and learns to optimize this sequence using execution-derived safety signals and flow-based sequence-level objectives. Extensive experiments show that AutoRAS achieves the best performance in both vanilla and adversarial settings, with the smallest performance degradation under attacks. Further analyses demonstrate strong transferability, stable optimization behavior, stability across primitive sets, and favorable cost trade-offs. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/guohezuy/AutoRAS}{\text{this https URL}}$.

AI.tldr: 提出AutoRAS框架，通过符号原语序列自动设计鲁棒的多智能体系统，在常规和对抗设置下均取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化多智能体工作流设计主要关注任务性能，而鲁棒性常被忽视，导致系统易受外部攻击和内部故障影响。
AI.method: 将系统设计公式化为生成符号原语序列，联合编码结构连接和行为动作，利用执行导出的安全信号和基于流的序列级目标优化该序列。
AI.result: 在常规和对抗设置下均取得最佳性能，攻击下性能下降最小；展现强迁移性、稳定优化行为、原语集稳定性和良好成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: AutoRAS有效提升了多智能体系统的鲁棒性，为自动化设计鲁棒智能体系统提供了可行方案。

title: Scaling Performance and Low-Resource Annotation with Many-Shot In-Context Learning for Named Entity Recognition
summary: In-context learning (ICL) with large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a powerful alternative to fine-tuning for Named Entity Recognition (NER), achieving strong performance with minimal annotation and no additional training. However, prior work has shown that despite their adaptability, LLMs still lag behind fully supervised models such as fine-tuned BERT in structured tasks like NER. While existing studies on ICL for NER have mainly explored few-shot settings, the potential of scaling to hundreds of demonstrations has not been thoroughly investigated. To address this gap, we conduct a comprehensive investigation of many-shot ICL for NER and further explore its effectiveness in annotating and refining data for low-resource NER tasks. Specifically, we evaluate various LLMs across multiple domains using hundreds of ICL examples and then assess the feasibility of using many-shot ICL as a data annotation framework. Our experiments demonstrate that: (1) scaling to hundreds of in-context examples enables LLMs to match or even surpass the performance of fully supervised BERT models; and (2) using about one hundred human-labeled examples as demonstrations, many-shot in-context annotation can generate high-quality labeled data, leading to approximately 10% absolute F1 improvement over existing state-of-the-art approaches when used to fine-tune BERT on low-resource NER.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多示例上下文学习（Many-shot ICL）在命名实体识别（NER）任务中的应用，发现将上下文示例扩展到数百个可以使LLM匹配甚至超越微调BERT的性能，并且利用约百个人工标注示例进行上下文标注可生成高质量数据，在低资源NER上相比现有方法提升约10%的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对ICL用于NER主要停留在少样本场景，尚未充分探索扩展至数百个演示样本的潜力。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究多示例ICL在NER中的效果及其在低资源NER数据标注与优化中的作用。
AI.method: 在多个领域上使用数百个ICL示例评估多种LLM，并评估多示例ICL作为数据标注框架的可行性。通过将约百个人工标注示例作为演示，生成高质量标注数据用于微调BERT。
AI.result: (1) 将上下文示例扩展至数百个后，LLM能够匹配甚至超越全监督BERT模型的性能；(2) 多示例上下文标注可生成高质量标注数据，用于微调BERT后在低资源NER上相较于现有最优方法提升约10%的绝对F1值。
AI.conclusion: 多示例ICL是NER任务的有效范式，不仅可以直接提升LLM的性能，还可作为低成本高质量的数据标注框架，显著提升低资源场景下的NER效果。

title: Beyond Damage Assessment: Recyclable Material Detection in Aerial Disaster Imagery Using a Lightweight Patch-Based Framework
summary: Nowadays, more and more disasters of different natures are appearing. Several disaster assessment approaches have been developed in order to identify damaged areas from aerial images. These damaged areas contain rich material that could be recycled towards several ecological purposes. In this paper, we present a lightweight approach that permits the efficient detection of recyclable material. Experimental results show the potential of the proposed approach towards localizing recyclable materials. Accordingly, we provide a rare dataset of material images that we labeled towards supporting the development of recyclable material detectors. The dataset of labeled material images is publicly available at: anonymous.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级方法，用于从灾害航拍图像中高效检测可回收材料，并提供了一个公开的标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 灾害频发，受损区域含有丰富的可回收材料，但缺乏高效的检测方法和标注数据集。
AI.method: 提出了一种轻量级方法，用于从航拍图像中检测可回收材料。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在定位可回收材料方面具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法支持可回收材料的检测，且提供了公开的标注数据集以促进相关研究。

title: Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data
comment: Accepted at AHTBE 2025 Conference, published in Medical Sciences Forum (MDPI). 18 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables
summary: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可解释AI和联邦学习的多模态框架，用于在保护隐私和考虑文化差异的前提下，早期识别大学生的职业焦虑与抑郁问题，模型在巴基斯坦学生数据集上取得了92.08%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 大学生职业焦虑和抑郁问题日益严重，影响心理健康和学业成绩，现有方法在隐私保护、文化适应性和可解释性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 构建XAI框架，融合结构化行为数据和面试视频面部情感特征，使用中间融合神经网络与注意力机制，应用标签平滑和联邦学习实现跨机构协作训练，利用Integrated Gradients和SHAP进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: 模型在巴基斯坦学生心理健康调查数据集上取得F1-score 89.12%、召回率86.54%、准确率92.08%、精确率91.88%。识别出回避直视、面部表情减少、社交退缩等关键行为标记。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个可解释、可扩展且情境敏感的AI心理健康预诊断系统，有望整合到全球学生支持服务中。

title: Olfactory-Inspired Sparse Combinatorial Coding for Low-Resource Named Entity Recognition
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) in low-resource languages suffers from limited supervision and a lack of high-quality pretrained embeddings. Biological olfaction, which relies on sparse combinatorial coding through receptor and glomerular organization, offers a compelling paradigm for learning robust representations under uncertainty. In this paper, we introduce a receptor-glomerular bottleneck - a novel, biologically-inspired olfactory architecture - between standard token embeddings and a BiLSTM-CRF sequence model. We evaluate our architecture across six multilingual datasets trained entirely from scratch (without pre-trained embeddings) under varied data-scale conditions, including a strict 1k-sentence low-resource control. Our results demonstrate that introducing a representation bottleneck yields F1 score improvements under severe data scarcity, primarily by acting as a powerful regularizer. Under the 1k capped training condition, at least one olfactory-inspired configuration achieves the highest mean F1 score across all six datasets. While these improvements represent near-ties with generic bottleneck controls for most languages, the olfactory architecture provides a significant advantage in languages like Bangla (+6.23% F1 over standard baseline and +8.47% F1 over the best control baseline) where generic bottlenecks degrade performance. We also observe improvements in the ultra-low-resource Telugu setting (+4.43% F1) at full-scale, and find that sparse specialization naturally emerges within the receptor layer. Our findings suggest that structured sparse coding inspired by olfactory networks serves as an effective inductive bias and regularizer when representations must be learned from limited or noisy supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出一种受生物嗅觉启发的受体-肾小球瓶颈结构（Receptor-Glomerular Bottleneck），用于低资源语言的命名实体识别（NER）任务，在无预训练嵌入的情况下显著提升性能，尤其在孟加拉语（+6.23% F1）和泰卢固语（+4.43% F1）等超低资源场景中表现突出。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言的NER面临标注数据稀缺和高质量预训练嵌入缺失的双重挑战，而生物嗅觉系统通过稀疏组合编码在不确定性下学习鲁棒表示的机制，为解决该问题提供了灵感。
AI.method: 在标准token嵌入与BiLSTM-CRF序列模型之间引入受体-肾小球瓶颈层（受嗅觉受体和肾小球组织的稀疏组合编码启发），不使用任何预训练嵌入，在六个多语言数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 在1k句低资源限制下，至少一种嗅觉启发配置在所有六个数据集上取得最高平均F1分数；孟加拉语提升+6.23% F1（较标准基线）和+8.47% F1（较最优控制基线）；泰卢固语在全量数据下提升+4.43% F1；受体层自然出现稀疏特化现象。
AI.conclusion: 受嗅觉网络启发的结构化稀疏编码可作为有效的归纳偏置和正则化器，在有限或噪声监督下学习表示时发挥作用。

title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Object Pose Estimation with Contrastive Alignment and Pseudo-Label Refinement
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) enables robust transfer of knowledge from simulated to real environments while exploiting a subset of unlabeled target data to improve real-world performance. Existing UDA methods for Object pose estimation often rely on global feature matching, multi-stage larger frameworks, or image translation pipelines, which tend to overlook the pose-specific information embedded in feature representations. To bridge this limitation, we introduce CAPLR that targets the adaptation of pose-sensitive features in localized regions, ensuring that domain alignment preserves the geometric cues essential for accurate pose estimation. CAPLR achieves UDA with three key components: (1) Efficient Cross-Domain Pairing strategy leveraging intermediate features to identify pose similar image pairs across domains without supervision; (2) Contrastive Alignment to perform feature alignment at localised regions in both intermediate and task-specific representations; and (3) Consistency-Based Pseudo-Label Refinement to improve reliability by encouraging stable target predictions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CAPLR achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple well-known object pose estimation benchmarks featuring diverse and challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: CAPLR是一种针对物体姿态估计的无监督域适应方法，通过局部区域特征对齐、跨域配对和伪标签精炼，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法（全局特征匹配、多阶段框架、图像翻译）忽视了特征表示中嵌入的姿态特定信息，导致域对齐时丢失了用于精确姿态估计的几何线索。
AI.method: (1) 高效跨域配对策略：利用中间特征在无监督下识别跨域姿态相似图像对；(2) 对比对齐：在中间和任务特定表示的局部区域进行特征对齐；(3) 一致性伪标签精炼：通过鼓励稳定目标预测提高可靠性。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的物体姿态估计基准上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: CAPLR通过局部姿态敏感特征的对齐，有效弥合了仿真与真实环境之间的域差距，为无监督域适应下的姿态估计提供了新范式。

title: Balancing Performance and Diversity in GRPO Autoregressive Text-to-Image Post-Training
summary: Autoregressive text-to-image (T2I) generation has recently advanced rapidly, yet aligning generated images with human preferences remains challenging. GRPO-style online reinforcement learning provides an effective framework; however, existing methods typically treat reference-policy divergence as fixed, despite its direct impact on policy optimization. We study this overlooked factor within a unified f-divergence framework, encompassing forward KL, reverse KL, and JS divergence, for GRPO-style autoregressive T2I alignment. Our systematic theoretical analysis reveals that different divergences reshape token-level updates in distinct ways. In particular, under the sampled-token shaping form used, JS regularization achieves a favorable trade-off by mitigating uniform bias relative to the reference policy while still discouraging large deviations. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Janus-7B show that JS divergence achieves the strongest or highly competitive optimization performance on most evaluation metrics while maintaining favorable generation diversity. The code is available at https://github.com/tuoyou-hao/BPD-GRPO.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自回归文本到图像生成中人类偏好对齐问题，提出在GRPO风格在线强化学习框架下研究不同f-散度（前向KL、反向KL、JS散度）对策略优化的影响，发现JS散度能实现最优的权衡效果，在LlamaGen和Janus-7B上取得了最佳或极具竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO风格的在线强化学习方法通常将参考策略散度视为固定值，忽视了其对策略优化的直接影响。作者希望系统研究不同散度在自回归T2I对齐中的作用，找到更优的散度选择。
AI.method: 在统一f-散度框架下系统分析前向KL、反向KL和JS散度对GRPO风格自回归T2I对齐的影响，揭示不同散度对token级更新的重塑方式，并在LlamaGen和Janus-7B上进行了实验验证。
AI.result: JS散度在大多数评估指标上实现了最强或极具竞争力的优化性能，同时保持了良好的生成多样性。
AI.conclusion: JS正则化通过缓解对参考策略的均匀偏差，同时阻止大幅偏离，实现了有利的权衡，是GRPO风格自回归T2I对齐中更优的散度选择。

title: Which Review Aspect Has a Greater Impact on the Duration of Open Peer Review in Multiple Rounds? -- Evidence from Nature Communications
summary:
Purpose: Peer review is essential to scientific publishing, but increasing submission volumes have placed growing pressure on reviewers and editors. This study examines the relationship between sentiment toward specific review aspects and peer review duration. It also investigates how this relationship varies across disciplines and review rounds, with the aim of supporting targeted manuscript revision and improving review efficiency.
  Design/methodology/approach: We adopt a two-stage approach. First, fine-grained aspects are extracted from peer review reports, and a sentiment classification model is used to determine the sentiment associated with each aspect. Second, correlations between aspect-level sentiment and peer review duration are analyzed. Sentiment scores are also calculated for different review rounds to determine whether these relationships change over successive rounds.
  Findings: Review sentiment has a weak but statistically significant negative correlation with peer review duration, indicating that more positive reviews tend to be associated with shorter review periods. Aspects concerning Evaluation and Results and Impact and Research Value show relatively stronger correlations with review duration. The relationships between aspect-level sentiment and review duration also differ significantly across review rounds.
  Originality/value: This study connects the textual content of peer review reports with the temporal characteristics of the review process. By identifying review aspects that are more closely associated with review duration, it provides evidence that may help authors prioritize revisions and assist reviewers and editors in improving review efficiency. The findings contribute to reducing the burden of peer review and accelerating scholarly communication and knowledge dissemination.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了同行评审报告中不同方面的情感倾向与评审时长之间的关系，发现积极情感与较短评审时长弱相关，其中"评估与结果"和"影响与研究价值"方面相关性较强，且这种关系在不同评审轮次中存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 同行评审是学术出版的核心环节，但日益增长的投稿量给审稿人和编辑带来了巨大压力。本研究旨在通过分析评审文本中特定方面的情感倾向与评审时长的关系，支持作者有针对性地修改稿件，提高评审效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先从同行评审报告中提取细粒度方面，并使用情感分类模型确定每个方面的情感倾向；其次分析方面级情感与评审时长之间的相关性，并计算不同评审轮次的情感分数以探究关系变化。
AI.result: 评审情感与评审时长存在弱但统计显著的负相关；"评估与结果"和"影响与研究价值"方面与评审时长的相关性较强；方面级情感与评审时长之间的关系在不同评审轮次中存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将评审报告的文本内容与评审过程的时序特征联系起来，通过识别与评审时长更紧密相关的方面，为作者优先修订、审稿人和编辑提高评审效率提供参考，有助于减轻同行评审负担、加速学术交流与知识传播。

title: NoduLoCC2026: Lung Nodule Localization and Classification Contest from Chest X-Ray Images
summary: We propose NoduLoCC2026, a challenge on lung nodule detection and localization in chest X-ray images. We have provided a dataset for both tasks and received submissions from 5 international teams. The participating teams' solutions are presented in this work along with results on an external dataset used for testing. Proposed methods show good performance on the classification task. The best method shows a balanced accuracy score of 0.72 and AUC-ROC of 0.79. We highlight the limitations of current approaches for the localization task, with the best approach having predicted the correct number of nodules on 53\% of the test images with a median distance of 12.83mm, showing that it is a more challenging task than the first one. The challenge website is available via https://gt-i2mdp.github.io/website/nodule_challenge.html.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了NoduLoCC2026肺结节检测与定位挑战赛，包含5支国际团队的解决方案。分类任务表现良好（最佳方法平衡准确率0.72，AUC-ROC 0.79），但定位任务更具挑战性（最佳方法仅53%图像预测正确结节数量，中位距离12.83mm）。
AI.motivation: 胸片肺结节检测与定位是临床重要问题，现有方法在定位任务上表现不足，需要一个统一基准来评估和推动该领域进展。
AI.method: 组织者提供数据集并开放挑战，5支国际团队提交解决方案，在外部测试集上评估分类和定位任务性能。
AI.result: 分类最佳方法平衡准确率0.72，AUC-ROC 0.79；定位最佳方法仅53%图像预测正确结节数量，中位距离12.83mm。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在分类任务上表现良好，但定位任务仍具很大挑战性，需要进一步研究改进。

title: AI Alignment From Social Choice Perspectives
comment: Accepted for publication in ACM SIGecom Exchanges
summary: Alignment from human feedback uses human judgments about model outputs to steer the behavior of language models after pretraining. When those judgments reflect conflicting views of desirable behavior, the learned objective becomes an aggregate determination of what the model should prefer. We survey recent work that has studied this aggregation problem through the lens of social choice theory. We illustrate how the social choice perspective helps identify failure modes in the feedback aggregation layer and reveals a broader design space for handling disagreement in explicit and principled ways.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从人类反馈中进行对齐时，如何通过社会选择理论的视角来处理人类判断中的分歧，揭示了反馈聚合层的失败模式，并提出了处理分歧的显式与原则性设计方案。
AI.motivation: 当人类对模型输出的判断存在冲突时，如何以合理方式聚合这些不同意见，从而学习到符合期望的模型行为，是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 本文通过社会选择理论的视角，系统综述了在反馈聚合层中处理分歧的现有工作，分析了其中的失败模式，并探讨了更广泛的设计空间。
AI.result: 识别出了反馈聚合层中由于意见冲突导致的失败模式，并揭示了社会选择理论视角下更丰富的设计可能性。
AI.conclusion: 社会选择理论为处理人类反馈中的分歧提供了显式且原则性的方法，有助于提升对齐过程的鲁棒性和公平性。

title: Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding
summary: Autoregressive generation in large language models (LLMs) conventionally decodes from the final layer, assuming that deeper representations yield more reliable next-token predictions. We revisit this assumption by revealing a recurring Guess-Refine-Perturb dynamic: early layers form coarse guesses, intermediate layers refine reasoning-relevant semantics, and final layers can perturb these refined predictions toward generic or alignment-preferred tokens. We introduce Confident Decoding, a training-free decoding strategy that dynamically selects the most reliable near-final layer through entropy-guided conservative backward search. We further provide a theoretical formulation of layer selection as an optimal stopping problem, showing that under bounded projection noise and dominant late-stage alignment perturbation, our search rule filters perturbation while bounding the loss relative to the oracle refinement layer. Experiments across dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent gains on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, Omni-MATH, and HLE, with zero memory overhead and less than 2% latency increase. These results suggest dynamically bypassing final-layer perturbations can unlock stronger reasoning behavior from aligned LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM解码时存在"猜测-细化-扰动"动态，并提出Confident Decoding策略，通过熵引导的保守反向搜索动态选择最可靠的近最终层，避免最后层的扰动，在多个推理基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为LLM解码应使用最后一层，但作者发现最后层会对已细化好的语义产生扰动（如偏向通用或对齐token），因此需要重新审视这一假设。
AI.method: 提出Confident Decoding，一种无需训练的解码策略，通过熵引导的保守反向搜索动态选择最可靠的近最终层；并将层选择形式化为最优停止问题，理论证明了在有限投影噪声和主导对齐扰动下的搜索规则有效性。
AI.result: 在GPQA-Diamond、Omni-MATH、HLE等推理基准上一致提升，零内存开销，延迟增加不到2%。
AI.conclusion: 动态绕过最后一层的扰动可以从对齐模型中解锁更强的推理能力。

title: Lightweight 3D Feature Pretraining by Bayesian Inversion of 2D Foundation Models
summary: We present Casper3D, a lightweight probabilistic framework for converting noisy multi-view 2D foundation-model embeddings into a latent 3D semantic representation. We model view-level semantic features as noisy observations of an underlying 3D semantic state and infer this state with a set-based variational model that incorporates relative pose during multi-view reasoning. Casper3D is trained by predicting held-out semantic observations from novel viewpoints, while remaining aligned with visual and text semantic spaces for open-vocabulary 3D understanding. The framework is backbone-agnostic and applies to both language-aligned and self-supervised embeddings. Experiments show that Casper3D produces more stable 3D semantics than simple multi-view pooling, especially in ambiguous and noisy settings.

AI.tldr: Casper3D是一个轻量级概率框架，将嘈杂的多视图2D基础模型嵌入转化为潜在3D语义表示，通过集合变分模型推理底层3D语义状态，支持开放词汇3D理解。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对多视图2D语义特征进行简单池化操作，在模糊和噪声场景下不稳定，缺乏对3D语义状态的显式概率建模。
AI.method: 将视图级语义特征视为底层3D语义状态的噪声观测，使用基于集合的变分模型结合相对位姿进行多视图推理；通过预测新视角的语义观测进行训练，与视觉和文本语义空间对齐。
AI.result: Casper3D相比简单多视图池化方法产生更稳定的3D语义表示，尤其在模糊和噪声环境下表现更优，且支持开放词汇3D理解。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种主干无关的、适用于语言对齐和自监督嵌入的轻量级概率框架，为3D语义感知提供了稳定且开放词汇的解决方案。

title: Composing Verifiable Conceptual Models via Building Blocks: Towards Design-Time Verification of Agentic AI Workflows
comment: To appear at the 2026 Winter Simulation Conference
summary: Agentic AI systems orchestrate multiple LLM-based agents through workflow architectures that coordinate decisions, tools, and external actions. While current platforms emphasize runtime safeguards, little support exists for verifying workflows during system design. From a Modeling \& Simulation perspective, this gap is analogous to composing conceptual models without verifying whether their building blocks interact coherently. We propose a design-time verification approach that models agentic workflows as compositions of reusable building blocks and checks their compatibility through twelve structural rules. We implemented these rules in a software prototype and evaluated them using two openly released datasets: 48 workflows with known design flaws and 168 variants that preserve workflow logic but alter graph structure. Results show that our verifier reliably detects violations even when flawed designs are obscured through structural transformations such as splitting tasks between agents. Future works could combine our verification with community repositories of building blocks to compose safe agentic workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向智能体AI工作流的设计时验证方法，通过12条结构规则检查可复用构建块的兼容性，并在公开数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体AI平台主要关注运行时安全，缺乏在设计阶段验证工作流正确性的支持，类似于概念模型未经验证直接组合的问题。
AI.method: 将智能体工作流建模为可复用构建块的组合，提出12条结构规则用于检查构建块之间的兼容性，并实现为软件原型进行验证。
AI.result: 在48个含已知缺陷的工作流和168个结构变体上测试，验证器能可靠检测违规，即使缺陷被结构变换（如跨智能体拆分任务）隐藏也能识别。
AI.conclusion: 未来可将该验证方法与社区构建块仓库结合，以组合出安全的智能体工作流。

title: Pre-Generation Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models via Soft-Target Attention Probing
summary:
Detecting hallucination risk before generation enables abstention, retrieval augmentation, and routing decisions without incurring the cost of decoding.
  While prior work has shown that such risk can be estimated from a model's internal representations, existing approaches treat this as binary classification over a single decoded output. We instead formulate it as a risk-estimation problem. Under this formulation, we introduce soft-target supervision based on the empirical answer error rate over stochastically sampled outputs - an estimator we prove to be the unique unbiased minimum-variance estimator of the model's per-prompt error probability under its sampling distribution.
  We further adapt attention probing to the pre-generation setting, enabling the detector to selectively aggregate hallucination-relevant prompt representations. Across three question-answering benchmarks and five models, attention probing outperforms linear probing on short-answer tasks. Replacing binary labels with soft-target supervision further and consistently improves detection quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在生成前检测幻觉风险，采用基于随机采样输出的经验错误率作为软标签监督，并引入注意力探针方法，在三个问答基准和五个模型上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将幻觉检测视为对单一解码输出的二分类问题，无法充分利用模型的不确定性信息，且无法在生成前进行风险估计以节省解码成本。
AI.method: 将幻觉检测重构为风险估计问题，使用随机采样输出的经验答案错误率作为软标签监督（被证明是模型逐提示错误概率的唯一无偏最小方差估计量），并设计适应预生成场景的注意力探针（attention probing）以选择性地聚合与幻觉相关的提示表示。
AI.result: 在三个问答基准和五个模型上，注意力探针在短答案任务上优于线性探针；用软标签监督替代二元标签可进一步提升检测质量。
AI.conclusion: 生成前检测幻觉风险是可行的，软标签监督和注意力探针能有效提升检测效果，为提前决策（如拒绝回答、检索增强、路由选择）提供了更可靠的风险估计手段。

title: SCOPE: Scale-Consistent One-Pass Estimation of 3D Geometry
summary: We present SCOPE (Scale-Consistent One-Pass Estimation of 3D Geometry), a novel approach for estimating 3D geometry from extended monocular video sequences, where existing methods struggle to maintain both geometric accuracy and temporal consistency across hundreds of frames. Our approach generates affine-invariant 3D point maps with shared parameters across entire sequences, enabling consistent scale-invariant representations. We introduce three key innovations: viewpoint-invariant geometry aligning multi-perspective points in a unified reference frame; appearance-invariant learning enforcing consistency across exponential timescales; and frequency-modulated positioning enabling extrapolation to sequences vastly exceeding training length. Experiments across diverse datasets demonstrate significant improvements, reducing relative point map error by 24.2% and temporal alignment error by 34.9% on ScanNet compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our approach handles challenging scenarios with complex camera trajectories and lighting variations while efficiently processing extended sequences in a single pass. Project page: https://scope3d.github.io/.

AI.tldr: SCOPE是一种从单目视频序列中估计3D几何的新方法，通过仿射不变3D点图和共享参数实现跨数百帧的一致尺度不变表示，在ScanNet上降低了24.2%的点图误差和34.9%的时间对齐误差。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长达数百帧的扩展单目视频序列时，难以同时保持几何精度和时间一致性。
AI.method: 提出三个关键创新：视角不变几何对齐、外观不变跨指数时间尺度学习、频率调制位置编码支持外推到远超训练长度的序列。
AI.result: 在ScanNet上相对点图误差降低24.2%，时间对齐误差降低34.9%，能够处理复杂相机轨迹和光照变化的场景。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过一次前向传播高效处理扩展序列，在3D几何估计的精度和一致性上显著超越现有方法。

title: Counsel: A Meta-Evaluation Dataset for Agentic Tasks
summary: As agentic systems tackle increasingly complex multi-step tasks, evaluating their trajectories presents a major bottleneck - human annotation of a single trajectory on popular agentic benchmarks can take hours, making it difficult to scale evaluations for measuring performance or curating training data. This has driven widespread reliance on automated approaches such as LLM-as-a-judge (LLMJ) to critique agents at the process and outcome-levels at scale, however, the soundness of LLMJ critiques often goes unmeasured. Here, we introduce Counsel, the first public dataset of meta-evaluations for agentic tasks. Counsel consists of process-level critiques from open-weight LLMJs on two agent benchmarks: tau-bench (customer support agents) and DA-Code (coding agents), and human meta-evaluations of these critiques. Human annotators label critiques on each flagged error as "spot on", "correct location but poor reasoning", or "should not have flagged", achieving reliable inter-annotator agreement (Krippendorff's alpha of 0.78). The resulting dataset stratifies LLMJ critiques by human alignment across both error location within a trajectory and reasoning quality, serving as valuable data to calibrate, improve, or train LLMJs for agents. Comparing open-weight judges, we find that more capable judge models and more reasoning effort both enabled improved human agreement, with the strongest judge reaching ~88% agreement on location and ~65% on reasoning. Counsel is generated using open-weight models and is permissively licensed for broad community use, which we hope will enable rigorous study and improved alignment of LLM-based evaluators for agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Counsel——首个面向智能体任务的元评估数据集，包含开放权重LLM裁判对智能体轨迹的过程级批评及人工元评估标注，用于校准和改进基于LLM的智能体评估器。
AI.motivation: 智能体系统处理复杂多步任务时，人工标注轨迹耗时巨大（单个轨迹需数小时），导致难以规模化评估性能或整理训练数据；广泛使用的LLM裁判（LLMJ）自动评估方法缺乏可信度验证。
AI.method: 构建Counsel数据集：使用开放权重LLMJ对tau-bench（客服）和DA-Code（编程）两个智能体基准生成过程级批评，再由人类标注者对每个标记的错误进行三类标注（准确、位置正确但推理差、不应标记），达到0.78的Krippendorff's alpha一致性。
AI.result: 更强的裁判模型和更多推理努力均能提升与人类的一致性；最强裁判在错误定位上达到约88%一致率，在推理质量上约65%一致率。
AI.conclusion: Counsel数据集可用于校准、改进或训练LLM裁判，为智能体评估器的严格研究和对齐提供了公开资源。

title: MindTailor: Personalized Emotional Support via Post History-Grounded Case Formulation and Collaborative Refinement
summary: As mental health concerns continue to rise globally, social media has emerged as a vital space where individuals seek emotional support. While prior work on personalized emotional support has leveraged seekers' emotional states, personas, and situational context, these approaches primarily capture the seeker's current state, overlooking the formative experiences that shape present concerns. In this work, we propose MindTailor, a framework that generates personalized emotional support responses by constructing a case formulation from the seeker's post history and iteratively refining responses through collaborative critique among counselor agents grounded in distinct counseling strategies. To enable research on this history-aware task, we construct ReddiSupp, a dataset of 798 Reddit posts paired with seekers' prior post histories. Through LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, expert human evaluation, and a user study with seekers, we demonstrate that MindTailor outperforms baselines across these evaluations, improving empathy, personalization, understanding, and achieving the highest overall preference.

AI.tldr: 提出了MindTailor框架，通过分析用户历史发帖构建案例表述，并利用多种咨询策略的协作批评生成个性化情感支持回复。在ReddiSupp数据集上，通过LLM评估、专家评估和用户研究验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持方法仅关注用户当前状态，忽略了塑造当前问题的过往经历，导致支持缺乏深度个性化。
AI.method: 1) 从用户历史帖子构建案例表述；2) 基于多种咨询策略的协作批评机制迭代优化回复。
AI.result: 在共情、个性化、理解度和整体偏好等指标上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入历史信息能显著提升情感支持回复的质量，多策略协作批评是有效的优化方式。

title: A Test-time Actor-Critic Approach to News Images Generation
summary: This paper introduces the CERTH-ITI solution for the MediaEval NewsImages 2026 challenge, which focuses on generating images related to news headlines. Inspired by the Actor-Critic paradigm in reinforcement learning, we present a test-time, model-agnostic Actor-Critic Image Generation approach (ACIG). ACIG generates prompts for image creation, produces the images, evaluates the generated results, and if needed refines the image generation prompts accordingly in a feedback loop. ACIG achieved the best results in the NewsImages 2026 challenge, according to the challenge's leaderboard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ACIG的测试时、模型无关的图像生成方法，灵感来自强化学习中的Actor-Critic范式，通过反馈循环生成、评估和优化图像提示，在MediaEval NewsImages 2026挑战中取得最佳成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成方法在处理新闻标题时缺乏有效的自我评估和优化机制，生成的图像与标题内容匹配度不高，因此需要一种能够在测试阶段自动评估并改进生成结果的方法。
AI.method: ACIG方法受Actor-Critic范式启发，首先生成图像创建提示（Actor角色），然后生成图像，评估生成结果（Critic角色），若效果不佳则通过反馈循环优化提示，迭代直到满意。
AI.result: ACIG在MediaEval NewsImages 2026挑战中取得了排行榜上的最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ACIG方法是一种有效的测试时图像生成优化策略，其模型无关的特性使其可广泛应用于不同图像生成模型，未来可进一步优化反馈机制。

title: ChainWorld: Composing Long-Horizon Desktop Workloads from Atomic OSWorld Tasks
summary: Computer use agents are evaluated almost exclusively on atomic desktop tasks, but realistic desktop work requires sustaining state across multiple objectives. We study this gap with ChainWorld, which composes atomic OSWorld tasks into long horizon desktop workloads through directional compatibility search while preserving the source evaluators. The resulting workload contains 347 chains of length two to four and compares two renderings of the same task sequence. In single turn evaluation, all tasks are presented together in one prompt. In multi turn evaluation, tasks are revealed one at a time. Across four current computer use agents, maximum chain completion is 31%. Multi turn evaluation improves completion for three models, but both protocols remain challenging. The two protocols also expose different failure profiles. Single turn failures concentrate on artifact precision, while multi turn failures more often reflect session management problems such as fragmented progress and later turn disengagement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ChainWorld基准，将原子级桌面任务组合成长链条工作负载，测试表明当前最先进的计算代理在长达4步的链式任务中最高完成率仅31%，且单轮和多轮评估协议暴露了不同的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有计算代理评估几乎只关注原子级桌面任务，忽略了真实桌面工作需要跨多个目标维持状态和上下文的问题，存在明显的评估空白。
AI.method: 通过定向兼容性搜索将OSWorld原子任务组合成长链条工作负载，构建347条长度为2-4的任务链，并设计了单轮（一次呈现所有任务）和多轮（逐步揭示任务）两种评估协议。
AI.result: 四种当前计算代理在链式任务中最高完成率仅31%；多轮评估对三个模型的完成率有提升，但两种协议都极具挑战性；单轮失败集中在工件精度，多轮失败更多与会话管理问题相关（片段化进度和后续轮次脱离）。
AI.conclusion: 现有计算代理在长链条桌面任务上表现不佳，单轮和多轮评估协议揭示了不同的能力短板，为未来开发更具实用性的桌面代理提供了评估基准和方向指引。

title: Beyond Value Benchmarks: Measuring Value-Structure Alignment in Large Language Models via Symmetric Q-Sorts
comment: 32 pages, 8 figures, 16 tables; accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in contexts requiring complex moral reasoning and value trade-offs. However, existing evaluations typically rely on item-level behavioral metrics, which fail to capture how models structurally prioritize competing values as a cohesive system. To address this, we propose a symmetric human-LLM evaluation framework, grounded in Q methodology, to measure value-structure alignment. Under our protocol, humans and models sort an identical 140-item moral statement set into a shared nine-column forced distribution; for LLMs, we elicit strict rankings and deterministically map them to Q-sort buckets. Using a human reference sample ($N=35$), we establish a stable three-factor reference geometry specific to this instrument and sample. We evaluate 12 LLMs across four model families via 240 replicated Q-sorts at two temperature settings, quantifying structural alignment via Procrustes similarity ($φ$) and RSA-based Spearman correlation ($ρ$). Our results reveal significant cross-family heterogeneity, model-specific sensitivity to generation stochasticity and localized misalignment, which demonstrate that favorable global scores can obscure underlying regional distortions. While rank- and bucket-based analyses remain highly consistent, prompt phrasing introduces notable variance. Ultimately, assessing value-structure alignment provides a crucial structural complement to traditional itemwise moral benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Q方法论的对称人机评估框架，通过140项道德陈述的强制分布排序，测量LLM与人类在价值结构层面的对齐程度，发现不同模型家族存在显著异质性、局部错位及随机性敏感等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM道德评估依赖逐项行为指标，无法捕捉模型在价值权衡上的结构性优先级，亟需一种能够衡量价值体系整体对齐的评估方法。
AI.method: 基于Q方法论构建对称人机评估框架：人类和模型对140项道德陈述进行九列强制分布排序；对LLM采用严格排序后确定性映射至Q分类桶；通过Procrustes相似度（φ）和RSA斯皮尔曼相关系数（ρ）量化结构对齐。
AI.result: 在4个模型家族的12个LLM上进行240次复制Q分类（两种温度设置），发现：跨模型家族存在显著异质性、模型对生成随机性敏感、存在局部错位现象，且全局高分可能掩盖局部扭曲；排序与分桶分析高度一致，但提示措辞引入显著方差。
AI.conclusion: 评估价值结构对齐是对传统逐项道德基准的重要结构性补充，能够揭示全局指标无法反映的局部偏差。

title: WildBox: A Dataset and Benchmark for Aerial Monocular 3D Detection of African Savanna Wildlife
summary: We introduce WildBox, a dataset and benchmark for monocular 3D detection of wildlife from drone video, comprising 237,505 3D bounding box annotations across seven African savanna species grouped into six benchmark classes. Annotations follow a KITTI/Omni3D-compatible format in a per-segment scale-normalised camera frame, with instance identities maintained across each segment. We evaluate two open-vocabulary monocular 3D architectures, OVMono3D-LIFT and DetAny3D, under zero-shot, ground-truth 2D box prompt, and supervised fine-tuning protocols. Open-vocabulary 2D foundation models provide usable zero-shot wildlife localisation (50.55 AP@50), but zero-shot 3D detection collapses to 0.00 AP across both architectures and every 2D-input condition tested, including ground-truth 2D box prompts, thus isolating the failure to the 3D stage. Fine-tuning on WildBox recovers performance to 8.68 +/- 0.47 AP-BEV@0.50 and 13.17 +/- 0.69 AP3D macro. Depth contributes 84% of normalised Hausdorff distance after fine-tuning and over 99% in zero-shot, identifying monocular aerial depth as the dominant open problem in this regime. A coarse-to-fine curriculum, i.e. pretraining on a merged zebra class before fine-tuning on the Grevy's/plains split, improves macro 3D performance with less total compute, with the largest gains on the two zebra subclasses. WildBox is released with video-level splits, evaluation code, and baseline checkpoints to enable progress in 3D wildlife perception from drone video.

AI.tldr: WildBox是一个面向无人机视频中野生动物单目3D检测的数据集和基准，包含237,505个3D边界框标注，覆盖7种非洲稀树草原物种。实验表明零样本3D检测完全失效（0.00 AP），微调后性能恢复，深度估计是主要瓶颈。粗到细课程学习策略可提升性能并节省计算资源。
AI.motivation: 无人机视频中野生动物的3D感知是一个重要但未被充分研究的领域，现有数据集和基准多聚焦于城市/驾驶场景，缺乏针对野生动物从单目无人机视角进行3D检测的研究。
AI.method: 构建WildBox数据集（237,505个3D标注，7种物种，6个类别），采用KITTI/Omni3D兼容格式。评估OVMono3D-LIFT和DetAny3D两种开放词汇单目3D架构，在零样本、真值2D框提示和监督微调协议下测试。提出粗到细课程学习策略（先在合并斑马类上预训练，再在细分类上微调）。
AI.result: 零样本3D检测为0.00 AP；2D基础模型提供可用的零样本定位（50.55 AP@50）；微调后性能恢复至8.68 AP-BEV@0.50和13.17 AP3D宏平均；深度贡献了微调后84%和零-shot中99%以上的归一化Hausdorff距离；粗到细课程学习提升宏3D性能并减少总计算量。
AI.conclusion: 单目航空深度估计是该领域最主要的开放问题；WildBox数据集和基准为3D野生动物感知提供了重要平台；粗到细课程学习策略是有效的训练方法。

title: Hallucination as Context Drift: Synchronization Protocols for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems routinely produce hallucinated outputs that cannot be explained by model deficiencies alone. A significant class of these failures arises not from model incapacity but from context drift: the divergence of internal knowledge states between concurrent agents. When agents enter a collaborative task with mismatched or stale representations of shared world state, their joint reasoning produces contradictions that manifest as hallucination. We define the Context Divergence Score (CDS), a lightweight scalar metric quantifying knowledge-state discrepancy between agent pairs across spatial, temporal, and task dimensions, and propose the Shared State Verification Protocol (SSVP), which lets agents periodically exchange compressed state summaries and flag high-divergence conditions before joint reasoning. We evaluate SSVP across two domains (multi-agent travel and software project planning) using Claude Haiku. In controlled experiments (n=30 per condition, travel; n=10, software) across 8 scenarios, naive full-broadcast synchronization increases hallucination rate by 34% above the no-sync baseline (HR: 0.658 vs. 0.492, p=0.0022, d=1.18), a contamination effect from propagating erroneous agent states. SSVP avoids this failure mode while showing modest, consistent reduction (HR: 0.463, d=0.30) and achieves significantly lower hallucination than full-broadcast (p=0.0005, d=1.47) using 58% fewer API calls. The contamination effect does not replicate in the software domain, where all conditions converge to low HR (<0.2), confirming it is specific to tasks where one erroneous shared belief cascades across evaluation dimensions. Our results reframe hallucination mitigation as a distributed systems problem and establish context synchronization as a first-class primitive in multi-agent LLM design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多智能体LLM系统中的幻觉不仅源于模型能力不足，更主要来自"上下文漂移"——并发智能体间内部知识状态的不一致。作者定义了上下文差异分数(CDS)来量化智能体间知识状态差异，并提出共享状态验证协议(SSVP)让智能体交换压缩状态摘要并标记高差异条件。实验发现全广播同步会因传播错误智能体状态而使幻觉率增加34%，而SSVP在减少58%API调用的情况下显著降低幻觉率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多将幻觉归因于模型自身能力缺陷，但作者观察到多智能体系统中存在一种无法用模型缺陷解释的幻觉现象——即智能体间的知识状态不一致（上下文漂移）导致联合推理产生矛盾。
AI.method: 提出CDS指标量化跨空间、时间和任务维度的知识状态差异；设计SSVP协议让智能体定期交换压缩状态摘要，在高差异条件下触发预警；在旅行规划和软件项目规划两个领域使用Claude Haiku进行控制实验。
AI.result: naive全广播同步使幻觉率比无基线高34%（HR:0.658 vs 0.492, p=0.0022, d=1.18）；SSVP实现适度降低（HR:0.463, d=0.30）且比全广播显著更优（p=0.0005, d=1.47），同时减少58%API调用；污染效应在软件领域未复现。
AI.conclusion: 将幻觉缓解重新定义为分布式系统问题，并将上下文同步确立为多智能体LLM设计中的一等原语。

title: Are Multilingual Models Actually Improving? Isolating True Cross-Lingual Transfer
summary: Cross-lingual transfer is a model's ability to generalize capabilities from well-represented source languages to under-represented target languages. Existing measures of a model's transfer strength conflate improvements in transfer with general improvements to accuracy in the source language. We advocate for an alternate metric that reliably captures transfer strength called Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score, and use it to derive multiple insights on factors influencing transfer strength. Our analysis across twenty diverse language models and three popular mainstream multilingual benchmarks argues that 1) transfer in small models is not broken, 2) we are making slower than expected progress in cross-lingual transfer with model size, and 3) we have made clear progress over time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的跨语言迁移强度度量方法——Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score，修正了传统指标混淆迁移改进与源语言精度提升的问题。通过对20个语言模型和3个多语言基准的分析，得出三个关键发现：小模型的迁移能力并未失效；随着模型规模增大，跨语言迁移的进展比预期缓慢；以及跨语言迁移能力随时间有明显进步。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言迁移强度度量方法将源语言精度的提升与真正的迁移改进混为一谈，无法准确衡量模型的迁移能力。因此需要一种更可靠的指标来分离这些因素。
AI.method: 提出Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score，该指标能够更可靠地捕获模型真正的迁移强度。基于该指标，对20个语言模型和3个多语言基准进行了系统性分析。
AI.result: 1) 小模型的跨语言迁移能力并未失效；2) 随着模型规模增大，跨语言迁移的进展比预期要慢；3) 跨语言迁移能力随时间推移有明显进步。
AI.conclusion: HAT Score是评估跨语言迁移强度的更优指标，基于该指标的实验揭示了关于模型规模与迁移能力的反直觉发现，并对多语言模型的发展提供了新的见解。

title: LEViL: Label-Efficient Video Learning via Zero-Shot Distillation over VLM-Generated Pseudo-Label Spaces
summary: Supervised video pretraining is a common transfer learning practice for improving downstream action recognition performance. However, it requires large-scale labeled source datasets, and the effectiveness of the learned initialization is influenced by the similarity between the source and target domains. Constructing such labeled pretraining datasets for different target domains is costly and difficult to scale. To address these limitations, this study proposes a label-efficient video learning framework that combines annotation-free video pretraining with target-label-set-aware fine-tuning. During pretraining, a vision-language model (VLM) generates textual descriptions of unlabeled videos, which are processed to construct an interpretable semantic pseudo-label space. A frozen video-language model then produces zero-shot soft target distributions over this space, allowing a student video encoder to learn semantically rich representations without manual source annotations. During downstream adaptation, target-label-set-aware fine-tuning combines supervised learning from labeled target videos with zero-shot distillation over the actual target label set, helping preserve VLM-derived semantic guidance while adapting the pretrained encoder to the target task. Experiments on UCF101 and HMDB51 show that the proposed framework outperforms the compared semi-supervised video action recognition methods across all evaluated limited-label regimes. Moreover, the annotation-free pretraining stage learns transferable representations that provide an effective initialization for full-data fine-tuning, despite relying on a comparatively modest unlabeled pretraining pool.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种免标注视频预训练框架，结合零样本视觉语言模型生成伪标签和下游目标标签集感知微调，在少量标注数据下显著提升了视频动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督视频预训练依赖大规模标注源数据集，成本高且难以跨域迁移；本文旨在解决标注效率低下的问题，提出无需人工标注的预训练方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用视觉语言模型(VLM)为无标注视频生成文本描述，构建语义伪标签空间；2) 冻结视频语言模型生成零样本软标签分布，训练学生视频编码器；3) 下游微调时结合目标标签集监督学习与零样本蒸馏，保留语义引导。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上，所提框架在所有低标注率设定下均优于现有半监督视频动作识别方法，且免标注预训练阶段能为全数据微调提供有效初始化。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了结合VLM零样本知识与目标标签感知微调的标签高效学习范式的有效性，为减少视频识别任务对大规模人工标注的依赖提供了可行方案。

title: Entropy Objectives in Markov Decision Processes
summary: We consider the problem of synthesizing control policies that enforce a concentration property on the state distributions of a stochastic system. We present a formalization of this problem in terms of synthesizing strategies for maintaining an entropy-based objective in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We first show that even relaxed versions of this problem are complexity-theoretically hard. We then present a sound and (conditionally) relatively complete method to verify and synthesize strategies for such entropy objectives. The main challenge is the non-linear nature of such objectives, and our approach addresses this by exploiting and combining ideas from convex duality and invariant synthesis. We also investigate the role of memory and randomization in ensuring entropy objectives. Finally, we implement our ideas to evaluate our approach empirically on a few illustrative benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机系统中综合控制策略以保证状态分布浓度性质的问题，提出了一种基于熵目标的马尔可夫决策过程策略合成方法，并证明了问题的复杂性，开发了结合对偶性和不变量合成的验证与综合方法。
AI.motivation: 随机系统的状态分布浓度性质（如安全性、有界性）在实际应用中非常重要，但现有方法难以处理基于熵的目标，且问题本身具有非线性特性和高计算复杂度。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为MDP中基于熵目标的策略合成问题；利用凸对偶性和不变量合成技术处理非线性的熵目标；理论分析问题的复杂度（证明即使松弛版本也是难解的）；研究记忆和随机化在确保熵目标中的作用。
AI.result: 证明了该问题即使松弛版本也具有高计算复杂度；提出了一种可靠且（有条件）相对完备的验证与合成方法；在若干示例基准上进行了实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够有效处理随机系统中基于熵目标的控制策略合成问题，结合凸对偶和不变量合成是解决此类非线性目标的关键技术路径。

title: OpenBioRQ: Unsolved Biomedical Research Questions for Agents
summary: A working citation looks like proof -- but the fact that a link resolves does not mean the cited paper supports the claim. I find that current agentic models rarely fabricate citations (over $99\%$ resolve), yet roughly $15.9\%$ link to the wrong paper. Existing benchmarks miss this failure mode: when a question has a fixed answer key, a model can reproduce the expected source from that key rather than independently verifying that the source supports the claim. I introduce \textbf{\openbiorq{}}, a retrieval-grounded agentic benchmark of $12{,}553$ unsolved biomedical research questions across $12$ domains that treats open questions as a faithfulness-and-abstention probe. To my knowledge, this is the first biomedical benchmark to combine an agentic setting -- where the model must issue multiple tool calls -- with unsolved questions that have no answer key. Openness is verified against real follow-up evidence rather than a model's parametric knowledge. Difficulty is empirical: I anchor it on questions that three open-weight reference models fail to answer, rather than on subjective hardness labels. On this hardest subset, held-out models from the same lineage as the difficulty anchors solve only ~17%, while three independent frontier agents (Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5) span a wide 29-60% range. The benchmark is thus hard, non-saturating (the best agent still leaves ~33-40\% unsolved), and discriminating across capability tiers. Beyond difficulty, I observe agentic collapse on the hardest questions, where agents stop using their tools. For the most collapse-prone model, blocking tool access entirely barely changes its score -- so tools stop paying off exactly where they are needed most. A frozen per-question checklist raises inter-judge agreement from Spearman 0.35 to 0.82.

AI.tldr: 提出OpenBioRQ基准——首个结合智能体设置与未解答问题的生物医学基准（12,553个问题），发现现有智能体模型存在虚假引用（约15.9%链接到错误论文）和智能体坍塌（在难题上停止使用工具）两大问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准忽略了一个关键失败模式：当问题有固定答案时，模型可以重复该答案中的预期来源，而非独立验证来源是否支持论断。需要设计一个没有答案键的开放问题基准来探测模型的忠实性和弃权能力。
AI.method: 构建12,553个未解决的生物医学研究问题（12个领域），基于真实后续证据而非模型参数知识验证开放性；以三个开源参考模型无法回答的问题锚定难度；采用冻结的逐问题检查表提高评判一致性。
AI.result: 当前智能体模型99%以上的引用可解析，但约15.9%指向错误论文；在最强模型表现中，独立前沿智能体（Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5）解决率仅29-60%；最高难度子集上，同系列模型仅解决约17%。
AI.conclusion: 该基准难度大、非饱和（最佳智能体仍有33-40%未解决）、能区分能力层级；观察到智能体在难题上停止使用工具的"智能体坍塌"现象，工具在最需要的地方反而失效。

title: Graph-of-Differences: Anatomy-Structured Difference Alignment for Medical Image Re-Identification
summary: Medical image re-identification (MedReID) enables longitudinal patient linkage but remains vulnerable to shortcut learning and often produces decisions that clinicians cannot audit against named anatomy. We propose Graph-of-Differences (GoD), which grounds identity comparisons in explicit anatomical structure. Each image is represented as an anatomy graph whose nodes correspond to named anatomical regions; given an image pair, soft node correspondence is established, and differences are computed over matched anatomy. A graph-level difference alignment objective ties these anatomy-matched differences to the global backbone difference, ensuring the retrieval signal is anchored in homologous structures rather than arbitrary spatial tokens. Explanations are defined over named graph nodes and quantitatively audited via node insertion/deletion tests, replacing unstable pixel heatmaps with verifiable structure-level evidence. On internal benchmarks, GoD improves Rank-1 by +7.1 pp on fundus and +3.1 pp on CXR over a strong frozen-backbone baseline, with further gains on zero-shot external transfers confirming that anatomy grounding improves both accuracy and generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/GoD.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph-of-Differences（GoD）方法，通过显式解剖结构锚定医学图像重识别中的身份比较，提升检索准确率与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像重识别（MedReID）易受捷径学习影响，且难以提供临床医生可审计的基于解剖结构的决策证据。
AI.method: 将每张图像表示为解剖图（节点对应命名解剖区域），建立软节点对应关系并计算解剖匹配差异；通过图级差异对齐目标将解剖匹配差异与全局骨干差异对齐；基于命名图节点定义解释，并通过节点插入/删除测试进行定量审计。
AI.result: 在内部基准上，GoD在眼底图像上提升Rank-1 +7.1pp，在胸部X光片上提升+3.1pp；零样本外部迁移实验进一步证实了解剖锚定可提升准确率与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GoD通过解剖结构锚定有效提升了MedReID的准确性和可解释性，代码已开源。

title: Training the Orchestrator: A Supervised Approach to End-to-End PDDL Planning with LLM Agents
summary: Translating natural-language planning intent into verified plans is a longstanding challenge: people communicate goals in language, while classical planners require formal PDDL specifications. Recent agentic frameworks bridge this gap by orchestrating a pool of specialized repair agents inside a verifier-checked refinement loop, but the orchestrator at the centre is itself a prompted frontier LLM, paying a frontier-LLM API call at every refinement step. We present HALO (Hybrid Agent-Learned Orchestrator), which trains the orchestrator from refinement trajectories that an external verifier has certified as ending in valid plans, across 11 PDDL domains. HALO pairs a small QLoRA-tuned policy with three hardcoded rules for trivially decidable selections, and operates over an expanded 21-agent action space. Unlike approaches that prompt a frontier LLM at every step or learn an orchestrator from sparse end-of-episode rewards, our key observation is that the verifier already provides strong guidance: every accepted trajectory is a sequence of demonstrably correct (state, agent) decisions, directly usable as supervision. Across PlanBench, Natural Plan, and classical planning benchmarks, HALO matches or exceeds the GPT-5-mini prompted baseline on success rate, sits within three percentage points of the stronger Gemini-3-Flash prompted baseline, reduces orchestration cost by more than an order of magnitude (\$0.18 to \$0.004 per task against GPT-5-mini, roughly 45$\times$ cheaper; roughly 15$\times$ cheaper than Gemini-3-Flash), and cuts total LLM calls per episode by 40 to 50 percent.

AI.tldr: HALO（混合智能体-学习型编排器）通过训练小型QLoRA策略和硬编码规则替代前端大语言模型作为编排器，在多个规划基准上以不到GPT-5-mini 1/45的成本和相近的成功率实现自然语言到验证计划的翻译。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖前端大语言模型作为编排器，每次精炼步骤都需调用昂贵的API，成本高昂；同时端到端奖励稀疏，训练效率低。作者观察到验证器已提供强监督信号，可直接利用已验证的轨迹作为训练数据。
AI.method: HALO使用QLoRA微调的小型策略网络搭配三条硬编码规则（处理可简单决策的选择），在21个智能体动作空间中运行。训练数据来自外部验证器认证的、以有效计划结束的精炼轨迹序列。
AI.result: 在PlanBench、Natural Plan及经典规划基准上，HALO成功率达到或超过GPT-5-mini基线，与Gemini-3-Flash基线差距在3个百分点以内。编排成本降低一个数量级以上（每任务$0.004 vs $0.18，约45倍节省），总LLM调用次数减少40-50%。
AI.conclusion: 验证器提供的强监督信号可以替代前端大语言模型编排器，通过轻量级策略实现同等性能且大幅降低成本，为自然语言到验证计划的翻译提供了一种高效实用的方案。

title: Can LLMs Control Readability? A Multi-Dimensional Evaluation Framework for CEFR-Controlled Arabic Generation
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent Arabic text, their ability to reliably control readability levels remains unclear. We propose a multi-dimensional evaluation framework for Common European Framework of Reference for Language (CEFR)-controlled Arabic text generation, assessing whether instruction-following LLMs can serve as reliable generators for adaptive language learning. Our framework integrates controlled prompting, automatic readability prediction using a validated Taha-19 model, lexical constraint validation, and syntactic complexity profiling. Results show that structured prompting substantially improves CEFR alignment. In particular, CEFR-guided prompting with lexical constraints achieves the highest conformity to reference linguistic profiles (0.91 cosine similarity) and near-perfect agreement with predicted readability levels (0.99), while unconstrained prompting exhibits weak control. These findings establish an empirical foundation for integrating readability-aware Arabic text generation into adaptive educational systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多维度评估框架，用于检测指令遵循型大语言模型（LLM）生成符合CEFR等级（欧洲共同语言参考框架）的阿拉伯语文本的能力。实验表明，结构化提示（特别是结合词汇约束的CEFR引导提示）能显著提升文本与目标语言水平的对齐度，余弦相似度达0.91，可读性预测一致性达0.99，而为加约束的提示控制力较弱。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽能生成流利的阿拉伯语，但其能否可靠地控制文本可读性等级尚不明确。为验证LLM能否作为自适应语言学习中可靠的文本生成器，需要建立系统的评估方法。
AI.method: 构建多维度评估框架，包括：可控提示策略、基于Taha-19模型（经验证）的自动可读性预测、词汇约束验证以及句法复杂度分析。
AI.result: 结构化提示显著提升CEFR对齐效果。CEFR引导提示加词汇约束的方案达到最佳：与参考语言特征的余弦相似度为0.91，与预测可读性等级的一致性为0.99；而无约束提示的控制效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为将可读性感知的阿拉伯语文本生成技术集成到自适应教育系统中奠定了实证基础。

title: FLM-Occ: Feed-forward Likelihood Maximization for Efficient Indoor Occupancy Prediction
summary: Recent indoor occupancy prediction methods adopt Gaussian primitives as a sparse 3D representation for computational efficiency. However, their training relies on voxel classification, which imposes only local constraints and lacks global supervision on the distribution of the primitives. Therefore, they inevitably predict spurious primitives in empty regions, undermining both representational and computational efficiency. To address this, we propose Feed-forward Likelihood Maximization (FLM), a novel framework that reformulates occupancy prediction as voxel distribution estimation. In FLM, a network is trained to predict a mixture model that maximizes the likelihood over ground-truth occupied voxels in a feed-forward manner. To enable end-to-end training of networks and voxelization of a standard mixture model, we define mixture weights as normalized primitive volumes to implicitly enforce simplex constraints and derive novel voxelization formulas. Based on FLM, our FLM-Occ, a novel method that is capable of relocating randomly initialized primitives over long distances to model a scene. On Occ-ScanNet, FLM-Occ achieves superior accuracy using only 32 superquadrics, 2.7% of the prior SoTA, while running 3.7 times faster.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLM框架，将占用预测重新表述为体素分布估计，通过前向最大似然训练网络，有效消除空区域中的虚假基元。基于此的FLM-Occ方法仅用32个超二次曲面（先前最优的2.7%）即实现更高精度，且速度快3.7倍。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯基元的室内占用预测方法依赖体素分类进行训练，仅施加局部约束，缺乏对基元分布的全局监督，导致在空区域预测出虚假基元，降低了表示和计算效率。
AI.method: 将占用预测重新表述为体素分布估计，训练网络以预测混合模型，在前向方式下最大化地面真实占用体素的似然。定义混合权重为归一化的基元体积以隐式执行单纯形约束，并推导新的体素化公式，实现网络端到端训练。
AI.result: 在Occ-ScanNet数据集上，FLM-Occ仅使用32个超二次曲面（先前最优方法的2.7%）即达到更优精度，运行速度快3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: FLM框架通过全局似然监督有效解决了虚假基元问题，显著提升了占用预测的表示效率、计算效率和精度。

title: AgentCAT: Simulating Computerized Adaptive Testing via Multi-Agent Large Language Models
summary: Computerized Adaptive Testing (CAT), as a key technology for personalized education, aims to accurately assess examinee proficiency by retrieving exercises dynamically matching current ability estimates. However, existing CAT research is constrained by limitations of static offline data and isolated component optimization. Restricted by partial labels in offline logs, researchers degrade the dynamic assessment process into static sequence prediction. Current research focuses on isolated perspectives, e.g., selection or diagnosis, neglecting the overall CAT interaction process. To address this, we propose AgentCAT, a Large Language Model-based multi-agent simulation system, to construct a high-fidelity benchmarking environment for dynamic testing. This framework comprises three modules: (1) The examinee agent with memory retrieval and Chain-of-Thought reasoning simulates responses based on cognitive profiles; (2) The selection agent uses coarse-to-fine bucketing and knowledge graph exploration to balance local difficulty and global coverage; (3) The supervisor uses dual-auditing and robust update to ensure convergence and validity. To validate the framework, we evaluated on two real-world datasets across three dimensions: macro-level ability convergence, micro-level interaction logic, and data sparsity resilience. Results show AgentCAT achieves effective ability estimation, and its selection strategy balances difficulty adaptation and instructional coherence, aligning with human pedagogical intuition.

AI.tldr: 提出AgentCAT，一个基于大语言模型的多智能体模拟系统，用于构建高保真的动态测试基准环境，解决现有CAT研究中静态离线数据和孤立组件优化的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有CAT研究受限于静态离线数据和孤立组件优化，将动态评估过程退化为静态序列预测，且仅关注选择或诊断等单一视角，忽略了CAT整体交互过程。
AI.method: 提出AgentCAT多智能体模拟系统，包含三个模块：(1) 具有记忆检索和思维链推理的考生智能体；(2) 使用粗到细分桶和知识图谱探索的选题智能体；(3) 采用双重审核和鲁棒更新的监督智能体。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上从能力收敛、交互逻辑和数据稀疏性三个维度评估，AgentCAT实现了有效的能力估计，其选题策略平衡了难度适应性和教学连贯性，符合人类教学直觉。
AI.conclusion: AgentCAT通过多智能体模拟有效解决了CAT动态测试的基准环境构建问题，为个性化教育中的自适应测试提供了更真实、更全面的评估框架。

title: Adding Robust Code-Switching Capabilities to High Performance Multilingual ASR
summary: Code-switching (CSW) remains challenging for large multi-lingual ASR systems in real-world deployment. While fine-tuning on synthetic CSW data is possible, it generally degrades strong monolingual baselines. Our goal is to preserve these capabilities while extending models to handle complex code-switching, including morphological variations across languages. We propose Bayesian factorized adaptation, which learns to efficiently integrate switching-relevant knowledge into strong pretrained models without overwriting existing capabilities. Requiring only a small amount of synthetic data, our approach reduces transcription errors by 32.87% on code-switched words while improving overall WER by 5.31%, all while maintaining mono-lingual performance. Our results demonstrate that effective CSW adaptation depends more on knowledge integration than data complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出贝叶斯因子化适配方法，在不破坏预训练模型单语能力的前提下，高效整合语码转换知识，使代码转换词转录错误率降低32.87%，整体WER提升5.31%。
AI.motivation: 现实部署中，大型多语言ASR系统处理语码转换（CSW）仍具挑战，而微调合成CSW数据通常会降低强单语基线模型的性能，因此需在不覆盖现有能力的前提下扩展模型以处理复杂语码转换。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯因子化适配（Bayesian factorized adaptation），仅需少量合成数据，学习将语码转换相关知识高效整合到强预训练模型中，避免覆盖已有能力。
AI.result: 代码转换词转录错误率降低32.87%，整体WER提升5.31%，同时保持单语性能不变。
AI.conclusion: 有效的CSW适配更多地依赖于知识整合方式而非数据复杂度。

title: OSOG: A Differentiable, Physics-Informed Synthetic Data Engine for Micro-Optical Environments
summary: Deep learning in computational microscopy is severely constrained by the scarcity of densely annotated datasets. While synthetic data generation has bridged this gap in macroscopic computer vision, traditional graphics engines rely on geometric ray-tracing, failing to capture the micro-optical phenomena required for microscopy. Conversely, while wave-optics formulations exist, rendering them computationally tractable at the scale required for deep learning remains a massive systems challenge. To address this, we introduce the Optical Synthetic Object Generator (OSOG), a high-performance, fully differentiable forward-modeling engine. Drawing on established physical models of diffraction and phase retardation, OSOG maps continuous Optical Path Difference (OPD) calculations into a highly optimized, PyTorch-native Structure-of-Arrays (SoA) architecture. We validate this computational framework across three axes: First, object detection models (YOLOv11-OBB) trained purely on OSOG-generated data achieve robust zero-shot transfer to real-world highly occluded Lysozyme micrographs. Second, we introduce DiffOSOG, demonstrating that the engine's end-to-end differentiability allows for the exact recovery of continuous optical parameters via curriculum-guided inverse rendering. Finally, OSOG bypasses the $\mathcal{O}(N)$ bottlenecks of sequential ray-tracing, demonstrating sub-linear scaling by synthesizing 40,000 complex wave-optic particles in under 50 milliseconds (\>20 FPS). By providing a fast, scalable, and physically grounded tensor pipeline, OSOG enables true real-time, on-the-fly dataset generation.

AI.tldr: OSOG是一个高性能、完全可微的显微光学正向建模引擎，基于PyTorch原生架构，可在50毫秒内合成4万个复杂波光粒子，实现亚线性扩展，并支持零样本迁移到真实显微图像以及通过逆向渲染恢复光学参数。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在计算显微学中受限于密集标注数据稀缺，传统图形引擎基于几何光线追踪无法捕捉显微光学现象，而波动光学渲染在深度学习所需规模下计算成本过高。
AI.method: 基于衍射和相位延迟的物理模型，将连续光程差（OPD）计算映射到高度优化的PyTorch原生SoA（Structure-of-Arrays）架构中。在此基础上提出DiffOSOG实现端到端可微的逆向渲染。
AI.result: 1) YOLOv11-OBB在OSOG生成数据上训练后，可零样本迁移到真实溶菌酶显微图像。2) DiffOSOG通过课程引导的逆向渲染可精确恢复连续光学参数。3) 在50毫秒内合成4万个复杂波光粒子（>20 FPS），突破顺序光线追踪的O(N)瓶颈，实现亚线性扩展。
AI.conclusion: OSOG提供了快速、可扩展、物理基础的张量流水线，实现了真正的实时、即时数据集生成，有效弥合了合成数据与真实显微成像之间的鸿沟。

title: Measuring What Persists: Conditioning Mechanisms and a Geometric Framework for AI Agent Identity
summary:
AI agents in long-context applications drift from their specified identity. Current methods detect this only after qualitative degradation is visible. We present a geometric framework for measuring identity structure using $\sqrt{\mathrm{JSD}}$ metric spaces and magnitude homology from enriched category theory, where identity is non-geodesic structure and drift is its relaxation toward the geodesic.
  Validated on a persistent AI agent, the framework's strongest empirical finding is a two-mechanism conditioning structure: cross-condition distances reveal an identity-vacuum cluster where the identity specification fills a behavioral void, and a safety-basin cluster where it displaces from post-training attractors. An equilateral probe baseline confirms that the identity specification creates measurable behavioral richness (55 unique response patterns vs. 1 for the base model) at maximum probe separation. A first-order perturbation theory for equilateral configurations predicts magnitude changes from perimeter changes alone, with shape perturbations first-order cancelled by the $S_n$ symmetry; the formula is self-consistent at the observed perturbation amplitudes.
  A drift experiment measuring magnitude decrease under context pressure was subsequently found to reflect repetitive-padding artifacts rather than genuine context-length drift; diverse padding produces no measurable deformation through 150K tokens. The magnitude homology framework's full diagnostic promise -- detecting anisotropic contraction and structural collapse via homological simplification -- is architecturally grounded in the perturbation theory and selection rules but remains empirically unconfirmed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于几何框架和幅值同调论的AI身份结构度量方法，通过√JSD度量空间和范畴论工具检测智能体身份漂移，发现身份规范创造行为丰富性但存在真空簇和安全盆簇两种机制，但漂移实验结果显示是填充伪影而非真实漂移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只能在质量退化可见后才能检测到AI智能体在长上下文应用中的身份漂移，缺乏早期预警的几何框架。
AI.method: 采用√JSD度量空间的几何框架和富范畴论中的幅值同调论，将身份视为非测地线结构，漂移视为向测地线的松弛过程。
AI.result: 识别出身份真空簇和安全盆簇两种机制；身份规范创造55种独特响应模式（基础模型仅1种）；漂移实验的幅值降低实际是重复填充伪影而非上下文长度漂移；通过15万token的多样化填充未产生可测变形。
AI.conclusion: 该框架的诊断潜力（各向异性收缩和结构坍塌检测）在理论上有扰动理论和选择规则的支撑，但实证上尚未得到确认。

title: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Grapheme-to-Phoneme Conversion: A Japanese Case Study
summary: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion is essential for controllable and robust text-to-speech, and large language models (LLMs), with broad linguistic knowledge, offer a promising approach. We benchmarked over 30 LLMs on Japanese G2P, comparing them with conventional morphological analyzers on 3000 manually annotated sentences. We evaluated two prompting strategies: a parse mode, where the LLM performs morphological analysis followed by rule-based kana conversion, and a direct mode, where the LLM directly predicts kana readings. The results show that model size, version, and Japanese-specialized training are key factors, with the best LLMs achieving kana character error rate below 0.52\% vs. the best conventional tool (1.03\%). Parse mode outperforms direct mode for most models, as rule-based post-processing relieves the LLM of handling complex pronunciation rules. We also show that feeding LLM-predicted kana into a kana-input TTS yields better pronunciation than end-to-end TTS.

AI.tldr: 本研究对30多个大语言模型（LLMs）在日语字形到音素（G2P）转换任务上进行了基准测试，发现最佳LLMs的假名字符错误率低于0.52%，优于传统形态分析器（1.03%），其中解析模式（先形态分析再规则转换）优于直接预测模式。
AI.motivation: G2P转换对于可控且鲁棒的文本转语音（TTS）至关重要，传统方法存在局限，LLMs具有广泛的语言知识，但尚未有系统评估其在日语G2P上的表现。
AI.method: 在3000条人工标注句子上，对30多个LLMs进行基准测试，对比传统形态分析器；评估两种提示策略：解析模式（先做形态分析，再基于规则转换为假名）和直接模式（直接预测假名读音）。
AI.result: 最佳LLMs的假名字符错误率低于0.52%，传统最佳工具为1.03%；解析模式优于直接模式；模型大小、版本和日语专门训练是关键因素；LLM预测的假名输入给假名输入TTS比端到端TTS发音更好。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在日语G2P任务上显著优于传统方法，解析模式通过规则后处理减轻LLM处理复杂发音规则的负担，且可提升下游TTS系统的发音质量。

title: EnTrust: Modeling Inter-Modal Conflict for Trustworthy Multimodal Medical Image Analysis
summary: Multimodal medical imaging fuses complementary anatomical and functional information, yet modalities frequently disagree in pathologically heterogeneous regions. Current segmentation models handle this in one of two inadequate ways: deterministic fusion that averages away disagreement, or post-hoc uncertainty estimation decoupled from the fusion process that produces it. Both obscure the clinically critical question: why is this prediction unreliable? We present EnTrust, a framework that treats inter-modal conflict as the primary source of predictive uncertainty. Our EnFuse module decomposes multimodal features into three disentangled components: shared anatomical consensus (F_c), modality-specific cues (F_{u,m}), and spatially localized conflict signals (F_{cf}), with independence enforced via a cross-covariance objective. This structured decomposition conditions SegDiff, a diffusion-based generative segmentation model whose sampled hypotheses diverge specifically in regions of modal disagreement. TrustMap then translates this hypothesis divergence into calibrated, pixel-wise uncertainty using ensemble entropy, conflict-guided perturbation probing, and a learned calibration head, enabling clinicians to understand not only where predictions are uncertain, but why. Across four benchmarks spanning brain, cardiac, lesion, and oncology domains, EnTrust achieves state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy while reducing calibration error by 40% compared to the strongest baseline. Notably, it outperforms 5x deep ensembles using a single model at roughly half the memory footprint. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/EnTrust.git.

AI.tldr: EnTrust框架通过解耦多模态特征为共享解剖共识、模态特异性线索和空间定位冲突信号，结合扩散生成模型SegDiff和TrustMap不确定性校准模块，在多个医学影像分割基准上实现SOTA精度，并将校准误差降低40%。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态分割模型要么通过确定性融合平均掉模态间的分歧，要么将不确定性估计与融合过程分离，两者都无法回答"预测为何不可靠"这一临床关键问题。
AI.method: 提出EnTrust框架，包含三个核心模块：(1) EnFuse模块通过交叉协方差目标将多模态特征分解为共享共识、模态特异性线索和冲突信号；(2) SegDiff扩散生成模型在模态不一致区域产生多样化分割假设；(3) TrustMap通过集成熵、冲突引导扰动探测和学习校准头将假设分歧转化为像素级校准不确定性。
AI.result: 在脑部、心脏、病变和肿瘤四个医学影像分割基准上达到SOTA精度，校准误差相比最强基线降低40%，以单模型约一半内存开销超越5倍深度集成。
AI.conclusion: 将模态冲突作为预测不确定性的主要来源并显式建模，不仅能提升分割精度，更能为临床提供可解释的不确定性信息，回答了"哪里不可靠"以及"为什么不可靠"的问题。

title: ForEx: A Formal Verification Framework for Explainable Reasoning in Logical Fallacy Detection and Annotation
comment: 2026 IEEE 27th International Conference on Information Reuse and Integration for Data Science
summary: Current evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) on logical fallacy detection focus on predicted labels, but do not establish whether those labels are supported by the reasoning the models provide. We propose ForEx (Formal Verification for Explainable Reasoning), a framework that translates LLM-generated explanations into Lean4 and verifies whether the translated rationale is derivable under encoded premises, not the logical validity of the original natural language argument. To distinguish prediction outcomes from the formal status of the supporting reasoning, we introduce the LLM Argument Verification Matrix, which separates label consistency from formal verification status. Experiments on LOGIC-Climate show that over 90% of LLM outputs can be translated into formal reasoning chains that pass verification, while agreement with human annotations remains around 20%. These results expose a systematic gap between formal derivability and label agreement, a distinction invisible to prediction-based metrics. ForEx moves LLM evaluation beyond label correctness toward machine-checkable analysis of formalized reasoning chains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ForEx框架，将LLM生成的逻辑谬误检测解释翻译为Lean4代码进行形式化验证，发现超90%的推理链可通过验证，但与人类标注的一致性仅约20%，揭示了形式可推导性与标签一致性之间的系统性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM逻辑谬误检测评估仅关注预测标签的正确性，而未考量模型提供的推理过程是否真正支持其结论。作者希望建立一个能够形式化验证模型推理链条的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出ForEx框架，将LLM生成的解释翻译为Lean4形式化语言，在编码前提条件下验证翻译后的推理是否可推导；并引入LLM参数验证矩阵，将标签一致性（prediction）与形式化验证状态（verification）分开考量。
AI.result: 在LOGIC-Climate数据集上，超过90%的LLM输出可被翻译为通过形式化验证的推理链，但与人类标注的标签一致性仅约20%。
AI.conclusion: 形式可推导性与标签一致性之间存在系统性差距，这一差异在仅依赖预测准确率的评估指标下无法被察觉；ForEx将LLM评估从标签正确性拓展为可机器检查的形式化推理链分析。

title: NL2Scratch: An Executable Benchmark and Evaluation for Block-Based Programming
summary: Block-based programming environments such as Scratch are widely used in early programming education, yet natural-language-to-code (NL2Code) research has focused primarily on text-based languages. Scratch programs are event-driven, visually compositional, and distributed across concurrent scripts, making conventional NL2Code assumptions and evaluation insufficient. We introduce NL2Scratch, an executable benchmark for natural-language-to-Scratch generation comprising 311,648 parser-valid NL--program pairs, whose program side is extracted from real Scratch projects and paired with semantically aligned NL descriptions. For reliable evaluation beyond surface overlap, we propose Semantic Alignment Consistency (SAC), an interpretable slot-level metric for measuring semantic agreement between descriptions and programs. With SAC, we construct a semantically validated pool of 23,594 examples, and a slot-balanced 800 diagnostic benchmark. Experiments across instruction-tuned and fine-tuned LLMs reveal a notable gap between lexical similarity and semantic alignment: models achieving token-level F1 above 0.93 often fail to attain perfect SAC, particularly on longer examples. Errors concentrate on operational slots like actions, conditions, and numeric arguments, exposing failure modes largely invisible under conventional metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出了NL2Scratch基准数据集和SAC语义评估指标，用于评估自然语言到Scratch程序的生成质量，发现现有模型在语义对齐上存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有NL2Code研究主要聚焦于文本编程语言，而Scratch这类基于块的、事件驱动的视觉编程语言具有独特的并发脚本结构，现有方法和评估指标不适用。
AI.method: 1) 构建NL2Scratch数据集：从真实Scratch项目中提取311,648个经解析器验证的自然语言-程序对；2) 提出SAC（语义对齐一致性）指标：一种可解释的槽级度量标准，用于评估描述与程序间的语义一致性；3) 基于SAC筛选出23,594个语义验证样本和800个槽平衡的诊断基准。
AI.result: 指令微调和微调LLM在词级F1分数超过0.93时，仍难以达到完美的SAC分数，尤其在较长样本上表现更差。错误集中在动作、条件和数值参数等操作槽上，这些错误在传统指标下难以被发现。
AI.conclusion: 现有NL2Code方法在Scratch代码生成中存在语义对齐不足的问题，传统词级指标无法有效捕捉这些语义级错误，SAC指标为块编程语言的NL2Code评估提供了更可靠的方案。
